amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Cacao-Chocolate-125g-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: Bitterresssssssstttt of all...Tastes bitter. No sugarhaving a piece of it. I ordered 4. Will finish it in 4 months time.Eat it as a medicine. Only for dark chocolate loversLots of minerals in it.Good source of antioxidants. Lowers bad cholesterols. Numerous benefits Google it friends.Good for heart and high BP and diebetic patients. I give it to my father (60) also.May work as an antidepressant too.Not a sweetner. But  a nutrient rich food.First 2-3 days it was difficult to eat but now its good. After all health is wealth.Great work Amul #FIT INDIA MOVEMENTDo not discontinue production this chocolate AMUL like you did for 90% cocoa. Retain this as your permanent product. Please give micronutrients information also in the chocolate.

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Cacao-Chocolate-125g-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: All the chocolate lovers will love this chocolate! (P.S. I said chocolate lovers not sugar lovers.). It's absolutely one of the best dark chocolates in India. You can go for it only if you are a die hard fan of cocoa! Order delivered was absolutely fresh and was in the finest state.

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Cacao-Chocolate-125g-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: Chocolate didn't melt in transit to Bhubaneswar( doesn't melt in transit to Bengaluru either).I love dark chocolate and can eat comfortably till Amul 90%, so wanted to try the ultimate 99% but found it a little too bitter for my taste so now I use it to make hot chocolate and it tastes much better than Hershey's. Just chop this chocolate into small pieces and stir it in your milk!

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Cacao-Chocolate-125g-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: Bitter is a very silple word, need some terrible word to describe this, i don't think i can go beyond 70% cocao... now i don't know what i will do with two bars.... on a lighter note: guys think twice before ordering, this is some 3rd degree torture not for general public use, might help military to torture terrorists. If i was a terrorist i would speak out everything after eating this in return of sugar..Jokes apart guys this is best and cheapest you can get, well done,  amul really the taste of india ❤❤❤

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Cacao-Chocolate-125g-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: It's DARK AND BITTER, so if you're one of those sweet suger filled fake chocolate lovers, than this is out of your league, stick to your sugar candies.It's extremely hard to find anything this dark in India and even if there are, they're extremely pricy cause of low quantity production. Thanks to AMUL, now we have true dark chocolate at affordable price.NB: Loving the texture and feel of the chocolate. I'm really happy.Update: Finished 4 packs in less than 13 days. Ordered another 4. I just love the texture of the chocolate in my mouth. Truly in love ❤️

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Cacao-Chocolate-125g-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: It's literally heavenly feeling to taste this chocolate. The chocolate is bitter to the core. It has no added suger. Sugery chocolate/fake chocolate lovers won't like it. It's for those people who has developed taste for cocoa/cacao over the period of time. It's made for chocolate connoisseur. Price is very less when compare to other brands in market. Plus Amul is well-known brand itself. Packaging was nice.

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Cacao-Chocolate-125g-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: I simply love this pure cocoa taste....not sure if people consider this bitter, I personally do not feel so, may be very mildly. But the cocoa taste, flavor indeed feels great.I had earlier tasted upto 90% dark among the Amul chocolates (& of course couple of other makes including Lindt). In fact I have graduated in darkness with Amul's progression in a way starting at 55% then 75, 90 and now 99% - in fact love the whole range by Amul. As long as this range is available I will never have to look beyond for Dark chocolates. Thanks Amul. In fact on an earlier occasion I had purchased 99% dark of some other make and did not like the flavor at all - strangely it had kind of a sourish smell and so far a bit hesitant with this item as well at first.Another thing the chocolates were delivered superbly packaged - thanks to the seller. Had a carton box outside and inside of it the chocolate packs had a layer of some kind of gel filled plastic bags to keep the chocolates at non melting temperature....pretty cool - so no melting problem or anything for me.So this would be my daily dose of dark chocolate from now on like a cube (or sometimes two) after each meal - enjoyable in taste, and so sugar, no guilt!!

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Cacao-Chocolate-125g-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: So basically, this is not the chocolate for everyone. At first when I tasted it, I badly regretted buying it. It tasted nowhere near the chocolate you would find in the market. There isn't even the slightest hint of any kind of sweetness in it and most people would find it gross. But the more I ate it, the more I could feel it's richness and realised how decadent it is. It's not a chocolate, it's THE chocolate.

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Cacao-Chocolate-125g-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: Amul 99% cacao is the best dark/bitter chocolate available in India... excellent innovation by Amul. I may tell that I am not endorsing Amul or any other brand...just my own opinions. It has been proven that cacao is one of the healthiest superfoods on earth with amazing health benefits. It's full of antioxidants & flavonoids which increase lifespan. It's one of the highest sources of nitric oxide which dilates/widens & relaxes blood vessels of the body by reducing blockages, thereby supporting heart & brain health. Cacao is also anti inflammatory and anti carcinogenic, thus reduces cancer risk. Moreover, cacao is a natural blood thinner, so can prevent blood clots, reduce blood cholesterol & blood sugar and lower blood pressure. Overall Amul dark cacao chocolate has enormous health benefits...so we must be thankful to Amul for making such an awesome health food. Please ignore the negative and one star rated reviews as those people are ignorant and lack awareness. Requesting all the sugar lovers...please don't defame such a nice and healthy product by giving negative ratings and one star. I pity those innocent sweet toothed people which focus on tongue taste rather than general health. Again, I am not promoting Amul company or a representative of the same, these are my personal views & experience. Those who want to enhance quality of life and reduce onset of lifestyle/genetic diseases like cancer, diabetes, hypertension, stroke, heart attacks, cardiac arrest, etc must not think twice...just purchase the stuff & enjoy. Infact, Amul 99% Cacao Chocolate is a heavenly bliss with irresistible taste. It is indeed Delightful & Ambrosial. I am giving a five star rating to this authentic product...if there were 10 stars, I would have given full 10/10. Lastly, thanks to Amul & Amazon, too for providing such a nice superfood at my doorstep.

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Fresh-Cream-250ml
amazon_reviews.review: The cream is of good quality. See the fat percentage to choose cream for the type of cooking you need it for. This is good for everyday use. A tip to ensure it lasts mire than 2 days is to keep it right in front of the fridge cooling vent, this helps it last for a week or so. Freezing doesn't help, it changes the taste and texture.

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Fresh-Cream-250ml
amazon_reviews.review: General product but do check the manufacturing & expiry dates.

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Fresh-Cream-250ml
amazon_reviews.review: It is good for other dishes but not for whipped cream icing,I tried it for icing and as it is not a nondairy cream it had very little fat and thickness and more of liquidy milk which made the consistency wattery and think,Otherwise it is great for other dishes,for icing non-dairy whipped cream would be better

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Pure-Ghee-Pouch-1L
amazon_reviews.review: Amul is a very old and trusted brand. I typically purchase Mother Dairy / Amul Ghee - depending upon which one is at a better price (per kg )or on offer :)As usual, good quality ghee. No issues at all. Amazon does good delivery in Mumbai, be it Prime Now or Pantry. So no complaints.Go for it - won't be disappointed.

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Pure-Ghee-Pouch-1L
amazon_reviews.review: I NOT LIKED IT.

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Pure-Ghee-Pouch-1L
amazon_reviews.review: Looks like a spoiled / duplicate product , packing date is 15th May 2020 the product isn't expired one

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Pure-Ghee-Pouch-1L
amazon_reviews.review: Guys dont order Amul ghee from amazon fresh the seller is selling some duplicate stuff.I got ill after having this.I hardly write reviews but this one i am writing just to warn all that don't purchase amul ghee from fresh at alllllll.You can see the picture.Even after putting it on burner it doesn't melt.

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Pure-Ghee-Pouch-1L
amazon_reviews.review: 3rd time I've ordered this Ghee.*1st time: Ghee was perfect, it solidified, tasted gr8-directly & in my BulletProof Coffee.*2nd time: Tasted poor, directly & in my BPC, never solidified & my Mother said the same too.*3rd time: Thought the 2nd time was a batch problem. But the problem has repeated. It does not solidify, & TASTES EVEN WORSE (directly & indirectly) than the 2nd time.p.s. my coffee ingredients are the same.No More Amul Ghee, guess a lot of potential for adulteration within their scope of products & quality control. Mother Dairy, Dynamic much much better.Amul Ghee has lost a customer.

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Pure-Ghee-Pouch-1L
amazon_reviews.review: Bad quality. I think Amul made this low quality product for online shopping perpose only.  Amul ghee from local shop, in tin container is GOOD.

amazon_reviews.review: milk got spoiled when we boiled it. not upto the mark.

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Gold-Milk-Homogenised-Standardised
amazon_reviews.review: Excellent quality milk. Thick and tasty. Works very well for making curd at home. Ensure you boil and then cool it down to warm temperature before putting it down to make curd. Otherwise can be consumed without boiling. Thanks to Amul for making it available across India. Only drawback is the additional cost we have to pay compared to Nandini and other common brands.

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Gold-Milk-Homogenised-Standardised
amazon_reviews.review: Very convenient to store. One does't need to buy every day & assured quality. Curd is fantastic. I store 10ltrs & forget for 15 days.

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Gold-Milk-Homogenised-Standardised
amazon_reviews.review: I got the expired pack..

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Gold-Milk-Homogenised-Standardised
amazon_reviews.review: Tastes like normal pouch bag milk. Feels no difference unlike other brands which though taste good, sometimes are a lot thicker to seem real milk.

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Gold-Milk-Homogenised-Standardised
amazon_reviews.review: Same taste as the store bought Gold. Moreover, tetra pack is awesome as it can be recycled and hence, environment friendly. Though a little bit pricier than those plastic pouches yet worth it, considering our future.

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Gold-Milk-Homogenised-Standardised
amazon_reviews.review: Not like milk.its a cream coloured solution ( not white like natural milk or daily packed milk) likely soya milk as it's taste tells,and it sticks to walls of container.again a sign of some powdered or soya milk.not a good choice only an emergency option occasionally.

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Gold-Milk-Homogenised-Standardised
amazon_reviews.review: Sheer waste of money as the Milk got curdled on the last two occasions that I ordered.It appears that delivering the packets during this hot season without adequate precaution spoils the milk.Although the packet states that no refrigeration is required till opened, however it also mentions that the packets are to be stored in a cool place.Thus the careless transportation in an ordinary vehicle in hot weather is bound to have an adverse impact on the milk.

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Gold-Milk-Homogenised-Standardised
amazon_reviews.review: Spoilt. Perhaps it is being stored or transported in harsh sunlight or something. For the past several months, several of my orders of these have been spoilt.  Curdled milk,straight from a fresh carton,  each time.

amazon_reviews.name: Amul-Gold-Milk-Homogenised-Standardised
amazon_reviews.review: Got it for little less than ₹ 50Value for money in this price.

amazon_reviews.review: Never buy this.. giving duplicate product..its not original ghee rather mixture of oil and vanaspati..no aroma on cooking..taste too bad...and smells on heating

amazon_reviews.name: Patanjali-Cows-Ghee-1L
amazon_reviews.review: I ordered for patangali 2  1 leter pouches,,but 1 is correct weight and another is less waight

amazon_reviews.name: Patanjali-Cows-Ghee-1L
amazon_reviews.review: I am not satisfied with the quality of Ghee. It doesn't have any smell and it's very iight.  Mother Dairy ghee is far better than this. Overall it's a 50-50 purchase .

amazon_reviews.name: Patanjali-Cows-Ghee-1L
amazon_reviews.review: Patanjali made cow milk deshi ghee is best of availed among all similar type of fmcg product, it taste was not so good but fair colour was same as normal home made deshi ghee have it also have a qr code which varifies that it is a original prodct made by patanjali so,finally I like to give a rating feedback to this deshi ghee product which is 08/10 it means 08 out of 10.

amazon_reviews.name: Patanjali-Cows-Ghee-1L
amazon_reviews.review: Just got this butter. I read nutritional information on the package and found that the amount of TRANS FAT does not match the description! The description indicates 0%, but actually 3%. For such a famous brand as Patanjali shamefully deceiving. I require update the nutritional information in product description!

amazon_reviews.name: Patanjali-Cows-Ghee-1L
amazon_reviews.review: Hi All,As I cut opened the pack I was really amazed by the ghee quality. We usually assume patanjali products to be  low/poor quality since it is manufactured indigenously or may be because we are already habitual of using Costly products. You may find the price hike too much of this Ghee, I can assure you it is because the quality is really authentic. I do not have the images of the ghee now. Ghee is thick, pale white in color. And taste so Delicious. The aroma is so authentic.It has long shelf life. However, I have recently started making Full cream cow milk ghee at home.Will definitely recommend everyone to try this Ghee.

amazon_reviews.name: Patanjali-Cows-Ghee-1L
amazon_reviews.review: No issue with quality of Ghee. But the 1 litre Ghee is supposed to be consumed in a span of 09 months and the product which you had sent, was made in Dec. 2017. Already 07 months have passed. It means we will have to consume this 1 litre of Ghee in a span of two months. We were expecting fresh packet.  Disappointed with the seller.

amazon_reviews.name: Patanjali-Cows-Ghee-1L
amazon_reviews.review: This product is worst...They are using duplicate ghee in this parcel...They mixed many other things in ghee...I threw it outside...Hate this

amazon_reviews.review: First time i tried a patanjali product.. Its just waste of our hard earning money.. There is  nothing to say positively.. amazon_reviews.name: Patanjali-Saundarya-Aloe-Vera-150ml
amazon_reviews.review: This product from patanjali can be a nightmare for your skin. Although the fragrance is good and it is a cheap product but that's all. I have normal skin and am not very prone to pimples. But after applying this gel for a couple of days, I started having pimples on my face. First I ignored, thinking it could be a result of the weather. But then the pimples started increasing. I immediately discontinued the product. But still I am unable to get rid of the pimples.

amazon_reviews.name: Patanjali-Saundarya-Aloe-Vera-150ml
amazon_reviews.review: I use this gel as my night cream and I am quite happy with it. It doesn't make me a beauty queen overnight, but moisturizes my skin the non-intrusive way, and thats what I need. The impact is for a short time, as it would 'naturally' be. Its a good replenishment especially in summers.Only thing I think they can improve is change the packaging and use a bit high quality one. The cap is quite sharp to open and close. This can hurt if not operated carefully. Secondly, its a tube. You usually, habitually, keep the tube inverted with cap down to take out the gel. When you open with cap down, the hard cap and not so thick gel work in conjunction and it opens with a jerk, throwing some of gel around, wasting as well as messing things around at times. I now, open the cap with cap on top and then invert the tube to take it out. I learnt after some messes. This is too much to be careful about and Patanjali sure needs to work on the packaging front of this gel.

amazon_reviews.name: Patanjali-Saundarya-Aloe-Vera-150ml
amazon_reviews.review: Very very very good for skin and hair ..i really appreciate it..if you have suffer minor skin infections , pimple ,acne and hair fall problem then go for it

amazon_reviews.name: Patanjali-Saundarya-Aloe-Vera-150ml
amazon_reviews.review: Good gelIt really prevents pimplesGood for all types of skinCan use as night cream as well as primer

amazon_reviews.name: Patanjali-Saundarya-Aloe-Vera-150ml
amazon_reviews.review: This is the best one for my skin type. In summers I have a acne prone combination skin and in winter's I have a sensitive dry skin 🙂 it is a miracle for my skin. And it is affordable too 😁 peeps of my skin type just give it a shot. Just wash your face with low ph cleanser at night and apply it. leave it on till the next day mrng. Your skin will be so supple and soft. My acne got reduced eventually in 1month 😘

amazon_reviews.name: Patanjali-Saundarya-Aloe-Vera-150ml
amazon_reviews.review: I use this gel as my night cream and I am quite happy with it. It doesn't make me a beauty queen overnight, but moisturizes my skin the non-intrusive way, and thats what I need. The impact is for a short time, as it would 'naturally' be. Its a good replenishment especially in summers.Only thing I think they can improve is change the packaging and use a bit high quality one. The cap is quite sharp to open and close. This can hurt if not operated carefully. Secondly, its a tube. You usually, habitually, keep the tube inverted with cap down to take out the gel. When you open with cap down, the hard cap and not so thick gel work in conjunction and it opens with a jerk, throwing some of gel around, wasting as well as messing things around at times. I now, open the cap with cap on top and then invert the tube to take it out. I learnt after some messes. This is too much to be careful about and Patanjali sure needs to work on the packaging front of this gel.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Multi-Use-Hygiene-Liquid
amazon_reviews.review: Was delivered the incorrect product variant.I purchased the Pine fragrance—I received the lime variant instead.It's not a small difference. It matters to me. I hate the smell.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Multi-Use-Hygiene-Liquid
amazon_reviews.review: Best. Smells awesome. And It's Dettol. So I can trust it blindly.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Multi-Use-Hygiene-Liquid
amazon_reviews.review: I mainly use this for spraying on bugs n spiders at house, mixed with water and vinegar. Sometimes for bath and washing baby clothes. Safe on hands and overall a useful product.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Multi-Use-Hygiene-Liquid
amazon_reviews.review: Good fresh smell, but be sure to dilute this before using.Useful on disinfecting things like Clothes, bathing, door handles or even on your smartphone's screen if its really dirty just clean it with damp cloth apply little of this. Always dilute before use. For stronger applications use the brown one.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Multi-Use-Hygiene-Liquid
amazon_reviews.review: Dettol is always the best...this new disinfectant cleanser is good for cleaning household things... I divide the bottle in three parts & add water in it to make 3 liters . With spray holder bottle I spray on the things which comes thru delivery, household goods& of course doors & handles...like it ...moreover it’s a pack of two. Value for money..

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Multi-Use-Hygiene-Liquid
amazon_reviews.review: A refreshing change from the original dettol which has a very antiseptic smell. This has a nice fragrance and I'm sure has the same Dettol protection that we've trusted over the years. Wish it were a little more economical though

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Multi-Use-Hygiene-Liquid
amazon_reviews.review: Its not an antiseptic like regular dettol, its disinfectant used for mobbing floors. So it should not be used for shaving purposes

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Multi-Use-Hygiene-Liquid
amazon_reviews.review: Supply water in Delhi has foul smell, this liquid certainly makes that smell gone! Plus killing the germs!I use it daily for bathing and washing clothes too!Online deal is good as I bought this at discounted price!Both variants smell fine! Blue and green

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Multi-Use-Hygiene-Liquid
amazon_reviews.review: Damaged product found seal broken and difference in quantity in each bottle

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Multi-Use-Hygiene-Liquid
amazon_reviews.review: Good for floors but won't recommended for daily bath or baby bath and in washing because of fragrance. The original Dettol liquid is recommended for bath and washing.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Cleaner-Home-Fresh
amazon_reviews.review: As Civilisation came to a stick end, the remaining Survivors fought over the last piece of the famed Antiseptic, claimed to be effective against all manners of Germs that covered the world. Finally, only a handful remained to satiate the desire of those who would be quick enough to steal these. Was it then worth it, for one man, to serve his own self, to grab the last Dettol? Over those that truely needed it, like healers of the sick people, or seek the ire of hoarders, who wanted the Last Dettol at any cost? The answer is yes, for not only this Dettol is effective as an Antiseptic, but also smells nice.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Cleaner-Home-Fresh
amazon_reviews.review: Original product

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Cleaner-Home-Fresh
amazon_reviews.review: We all know the Dettol brand.  I grew up with this brand back home in Sydney.  I am not fond of the alleged disinfectants at the local markets.  Good to see Dettol expanded.  I use this in my floor wash, you only need a very tiny amount as it soaps up,  I do mix it with a little lizzol to other floor cleaner.  Great for the bathroom and kitchen do.  Happy customer!!

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Cleaner-Home-Fresh
amazon_reviews.review: Dettol is no doubt a good brand for disinfectant liquids. As compare to dettol original, this Lime fragrance gives a fresh feel after using. Can use for floors, kitchen tiles, bathroom, laundry & shaving purpose. I use this disinfectant liquid with water in this COVID-19 pandemic to wash products and spray on doors, door bell, all surfaces etc. We can use this for bathing purpose also. It is multi-purpose cleaner is safe on skin and on all surfaces. Nice way to disinfect your home.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Cleaner-Home-Fresh
amazon_reviews.review: Protect your loved ones from virus like COVID 19 dettol disinfectant liquid is one of the best solution. Although it's scentless but you can use it as a laundry sanitizer or to disinfect anything which comes under human contact.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Cleaner-Home-Fresh
amazon_reviews.review: I have never purchased this variety before. I have always used dettol antiseptic liquid. But during lock-down it was vanished from local medicine stores. So I moved online, it was even difficult to get one there also. However, after lots of attempt I got 1. After using this for shaving purpose I think it is equally good as antiseptic variety. It leaves a freshness felling after washing face with this. This leaves a refreshing fragrance if mixed with bathing water. I am very much pleased after using this variety and will buy this again in future.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Cleaner-Home-Fresh
amazon_reviews.review: Great product from Dettol. As advertised, it can be used in bathing, shaving, laundry disinfection, floor cleaning, kitchen & bathroom cleaning, refrigerator and cleaning other substances.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Cleaner-Home-Fresh
amazon_reviews.review: To be honestly i have been using regular brown colour antiseptic liquid and i loved it so i thought to buy lemon scent liquid in hope that it will be much good than last one. But when i saw it's much sticky liquid and when we add it in water it goes like invisible.. Very dissapointed -_- last one brown was more better but this one thumbs down.. Don't buy dont go on reviews.. I was purchased on reviews too.. U will regret once u use.. scent 2/10Thickness 2/10..really dont buy dont waste ur money on lemon.. Buy brown liquid

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Cleaner-Home-Fresh
amazon_reviews.review: There are plenty of other brands which are similar to Dettol but the question is whether you can trust it or not.  In my home the product is used as mixture with water for rinsing clothes, mopping floor and as spray-liquid to disinfect. It is a also a part of the first-aid box. The fresh lime fragrance smells great.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Cleaner-Home-Fresh
amazon_reviews.review: Dettol is no doubt an authentic product. This Dettol Liquid is the totally different from the original antiseptic liquid. It's smell not Very strong like Antiseptic Liquid,it's lime fresh aroma make thik product attractive. In this pandamic Situation this Product is Value of money Product. I got this Product at Rs. 315/-  where the printing price is Rs. 347/-The delivery was little bit slow, I have no issues in it, Finally I would like to say thank you Amazon and it's whole entire team. You are doing a great job for us in this situation, hats of to You.

Don't buy dont go on reviews.. I was purchased on reviews too.. U will regret once u use.. scent 2/10Thickness 2/10..really dont buy dont waste ur money on lemon.. Buy brown liquid

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Cleaner-Home-Fresh
amazon_reviews.review: There are plenty of other brands which are similar to Dettol but the question is whether you can trust it or not.  In my home the product is used as mixture with water for rinsing clothes, mopping floor and as spray-liquid to disinfect. It is a also a part of the first-aid box. The fresh lime fragrance smells great.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Cleaner-Home-Fresh
amazon_reviews.review: Dettol is no doubt an authentic product. This Dettol Liquid is the totally different from the original antiseptic liquid. It's smell not Very strong like Antiseptic Liquid,it's lime fresh aroma make thik product attractive. In this pandamic Situation this Product is Value of money Product. I got this Product at Rs. 315/-  where the printing price is Rs. 347/-The delivery was little bit slow, I have no issues in it, Finally I would like to say thank you Amazon and it's whole entire team. You are doing a great job for us in this situation, hats of to You.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Liquid-Refill-Original-1500
amazon_reviews.review: First i thought its a Great value in such low price,but after using it i realised it a fake one guys. The product is diluted. Better to give some more money and buy the real product rather than saving money and getting a fake one!

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Liquid-Refill-Original-1500
amazon_reviews.review: Original Product with good packaging, longer expiry date and less price than usual MRP. A must buy product for every household. Got it at 151/- Rs.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Liquid-Refill-Original-1500
amazon_reviews.review: Dettol's quality is the best. However, in value, it is available on Amazon only on MRP. But in general the 1.5 liter refill pack is not available in the market. So if you are a Amazon Prime member then you can buy it

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Liquid-Refill-Original-1500
amazon_reviews.review: Got empty sooner than expected lol. But good.stuffEdit: this time there was a problem. After half the pack was empty, the liquid is totally rubbish. It doesn't lather at all !The liquid at the bottom smelled like phenylRealised this is fake  tampered package.When will India ever be free of this malpractice and adultery !Very disappointed. Won't buy again

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Liquid-Refill-Original-1500
amazon_reviews.review: Its dilutated. I ignored the comments that said the product is fake, but after I received the product I noticed colour of the soap is lighter than the soap that I bought from the local store and the soap is watery ke less viscous. Being a student I thought this will be value for money kinda deak but this is a fake product and the seller is looting customers

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Liquid-Refill-Original-1500
amazon_reviews.review: Great deal and good packaging.  Packaging so impressive.  Words are too short for defining.  Thanks Amazon

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Liquid-Refill-Original-1500
amazon_reviews.review: The seal of the cap was opened when received.Also, the quantity seem to be less than actually written on the product as seal was opened.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Liquid-Refill-Original-1500
amazon_reviews.review: Seal was brokenAnd totally damaged packet..

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Liquid-Refill-Original-1500
amazon_reviews.review: You might think you would buy a refill instead of a new bottle to save money or even reduce plastic use.However do not buy this refill. It is not the original dettol handwash.As soon as i refilled bottle and started using i noticed first color is lighter. Noticeably lighter. Then i noticed that the scent is very faint compared to original one from bottle.I ignored it because in times like these you cant be picky.Then two days later i noticed my skin peeling off like it never has before. I have used handwash for a long time it has never happened to me.I wouldn't even risk givin this pack away to someone for free because it is awful. So it will end up in dustbin.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Liquid-Refill-Original-1500
amazon_reviews.review: The product packaging was good. Inside the package, you get one 1500ml dettol liquid handwash.Now, there is one thing I'm extremely upset about which is that the liquid seems diluted. It's like someone mixed water in it. It doesn't feel like dettol at all. I'm not saying that it is fake or not but that's what I got. About the scent, it's not very strong. It's value for money only if you get it at good discount. I got it for 188rs.Anyways, if you find this review "Helpful" please do let me know. Thank you.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Multi-Purpose-Disinfectant-Surfaces-Original
amazon_reviews.review: More of an air freshener and smells good

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Multi-Purpose-Disinfectant-Surfaces-Original
amazon_reviews.review: I have two small kids at home and they are continuously falling ill these days. So, I bought Dettol disinfected spray last week and very much satisfied with it. It has a very nice and mild scented fragrance. I tried it inside my car, washroom and kids room as well. It leaves the place very fresh and nice.Although, there is no way to check whether it kills the germs or not but still I think it worth to try once. All the freshners, which I had tried before, came with very hard scented and irritating smell. But this is very mild and soothing.One should give it a try for sure as it is pocket friendly too.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Multi-Purpose-Disinfectant-Surfaces-Original
amazon_reviews.review: Was looking for a good disinfectant spray as I have toddlers and keeping them safe from flu and virus is really tough. So while browsing Dettol caught my eye and without a second thought got it. It has mild scent and really easy to use. It evaporates in 15-20 seconds and so saves time. I Use it when I go out especially in public toilets. So convenient and travel friendly. Will definitely recommend.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Multi-Purpose-Disinfectant-Surfaces-Original
amazon_reviews.review: Alcohol content is only 57% whereas I was given to understand its 72% . The Amazon listing does not mention alcohol content which is very important as anything less than 60% is ineffective to kill viruses like Covid -19 . Ideally should be 70% alcohol for it to be totally effective

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Multi-Purpose-Disinfectant-Surfaces-Original
amazon_reviews.review: I have orderd two spray bottle and recieved only one cap. One spray os with cap and one without. Smell is also not so good.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Multi-Purpose-Disinfectant-Surfaces-Original
amazon_reviews.review: Received unsealed cans. Cap fell off easily & nozzle was unsealed. Raises doubt how a brand like dettol can sell unsealed items. Not sure if original.The sprayer design is also different from my earlier purchases. Earlier the item had a nice hooded spray mechanism without cap. This one is a regular type like with cap (similar to perfumes & savlon spray)

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Multi-Purpose-Disinfectant-Surfaces-Original
amazon_reviews.review: I ordered this product because of Covid19. But used it after 2 weeks and found that this will kill you as well. After you spray it will get into your respiratory system and you won't be able to breath. The smell is very harsh. It suffocates you. I followed there guidelines and wore mask while spraying on items. But the spray will remain in air for a while and you will inhale it. It took 1 hour for me to come to my normal breathing. This was my personal experience. I won't suggest this product to any one. Please do not buy this product

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Multi-Purpose-Disinfectant-Surfaces-Original
amazon_reviews.review: Be 100% sure, when you use a dettol products. Far better from others spray present in the market now.New improved container spray with a pleasent fragrance. Carry it inside your bag and stay safe.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Multi-Purpose-Disinfectant-Surfaces-Original
amazon_reviews.review: I used this product first time and I'm very much satisfied with this multi-purpose disinfectant spray that kills bacteria and viruses by eliminating odour causing bacteria . We can use this product in bedroom , toilet , kitchen , mattress etc . I recommend this product because it is very hygienic  and it also gives pleasant fragrance after every use.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Multi-Purpose-Disinfectant-Surfaces-Original
amazon_reviews.review: Dettol Surface Disinfectant Spray is good  for killing germs. But few points are worth noting.1. New spray bottle comes with a cap, whereas old bottle comes without cap, which is discontinued by dettol.2. Most of the material inside is gas, very less quantity of alcohol.3. New spray pump has very less spray power(too weak) when compared to old one.4. Dettol is widely used by people inspite of the fact that it comes with 60% alcohol, whereas other brands like savlon comes with 62% alcohol.5. Fragrance is strong.6. Cap is not properly fitted and comes off very easily.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Multi-Purpose-Disinfectant-Surfaces-Original
amazon_reviews.review: More of an air freshener and smells good

amazon_reviews.name: Savlon-After-Shave-Lotion-1000
amazon_reviews.review: Savlon liquid is a must for home. It is far better than so called Dettol as savlon has CHG and cetrimide. It has better efficacy against germs but the advertisement by HUL have made people sick so they buy dettol.It doesn't burn skin when applied on cuts / wound. Better smell. Also an Indian Product.

amazon_reviews.name: Savlon-After-Shave-Lotion-1000
amazon_reviews.review: Much better than dettol, doesn't burn, Doctor has recommended this over dettol anyway. Use it multiple ways - regular use of cuts and bruises, use it to add to floor wash bucket and other cleaning needs.

amazon_reviews.name: Savlon-After-Shave-Lotion-1000
amazon_reviews.review: Much needed product during this pandemic

amazon_reviews.name: Savlon-After-Shave-Lotion-1000
amazon_reviews.review: Was waiting for a long long time to get my hands on this post pandemic. It's still very difficult to find in local stores or any other online shops and finally it's now available on Amazon.Extreme useful and versatile liquid to have at home which can be used for first aids, bathing, shaving, disinfecting clothes or even for floor cleaning. Do dilute the liquid as per the instructions mentioned on the product label.It contains Chlorhexidine Gluconate Solution I. P. 1.5% v/v and strong Cetrimide Solution B.P. equivalent to Cetrimide I.P. 3.0% w/v to provide antiseptic and disinfectant properties. This duo not only more effective than Dettol's (Original Brown liquid) Chloroxylenol but also doesn't sting after applying on skin.There's also now a Multipurpose Disinfectant cleaner from Savlon to compete against Dettol's Multipurpose Liquid (Green, Blue bottle) which is more suitable as disinfectant if you want nice fragrance but also a lot more expensive  https://www.amazon.in/dp/B08CL5P72J/, stick to this Original Savlon if you don't want much fragrance.

amazon_reviews.name: Savlon-After-Shave-Lotion-1000
amazon_reviews.review: Best but price is on mrp  no discount

amazon_reviews.name: Savlon-After-Shave-Lotion-1000
amazon_reviews.review: Product is aqurate, original, recently manufacture. Seal is ok, good condition, good packaging. Completely satisfied.

amazon_reviews.name: Savlon-After-Shave-Lotion-1000
amazon_reviews.review: Savlon is the modern antiseptic. It has a no burn formula. I use it everywhere. On clothes, in the floor cleanser and add to the bathing water . Great to see it in Amazon.

amazon_reviews.name: Savlon-After-Shave-Lotion-1000
amazon_reviews.review: I gave this a try as dettol antiseptic was not available. Not sure about effectiveness. But unlike dettol, water turns orange in colour upon using savlon and cant be used for laundry especially for white clothes. It doesnt stain clothes but gives a very mild peachy tint. Coming to scent, i read some reviews where it was mentioned that smell is better than dettol. But i  dont feel the difference.  In fact i prefer dettol smell, may be because we were using it since long..

amazon_reviews.name: Savlon-After-Shave-Lotion-1000
amazon_reviews.review: I have doubt, is this original or duplicate product..May b duplicate one...

amazon_reviews.name: Savlon-After-Shave-Lotion-1000
amazon_reviews.review: Smells like strong chemical, not at all a pleasant smell as some reviews say. We used it for a nappy wash for our baby and the only thing happening is getting an orange colour share on the dress. This has a bad smell if you think Dettol's smell is bad, then this is horrible. There is no need to buy a product only because it is made by an Indian company. You may see this pattern on positive comments do not get tricked with it.

This duo not only more effective than Dettol's (Original Brown liquid) Chloroxylenol but also doesn't sting after applying on skin.There's also now a Multipurpose Disinfectant cleaner from Savlon to compete against Dettol's Multipurpose Liquid (Green, Blue bottle) which is more suitable as disinfectant if you want nice fragrance but also a lot more expensive  https://www.amazon.in/dp/B08CL5P72J/, stick to this Original Savlon if you don't want much fragrance.

amazon_reviews.review: Already using dettol lime fresh (green) from its launch which is a great product but this menthol cool (blue) is best

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Liquid-Menthol-Cool
amazon_reviews.review: Very effective. Active ingredients are  quaternary ammonium chloride compounds which are a very potent and effective disinfectant - you can find these in most non-bleach disinfectant solutions. This is not the same as Dettol antiseptic used for skin so do not use it for that purpose. I am glad that Dettol introduced this as it was difficult to find purpose-made disinfectant concentrates of this formulation - the alternative was Amway Pursue which is not only much more expensive but would involve the hassle of dealing with a pushy Amway salesperson. Anyways, this one has a strong menthol smell and a highly effective disinfectant so fantastic for household use. Also works for laundry, but use it as a pre-wash, with a full wash cycle afterwards to clean out any residues.Also, a word of caution with this and any other disinfectants - please use it wisely and not indiscriminately as overuse not only can damage the environment but kill of beneficial microorganisms and cause harmful ones to develop resistance.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Liquid-Menthol-Cool
amazon_reviews.review: This is one of the best disinfectant I have ever used. It has a strong menthol smell which I just love. This is a multipurpose liquid ,which can be used to clean laundry, wipe the floor, used while shaving to cleanse the razor, kitchen and bathroom cleaning, can be added to bathing water while taking a bath (those who don't mind menthol smell). Mind you, this is not the good old detail antiseptic liquid which comes with the clear bottle and green cap,which  is handy for cuts and wounds. This is an disinfectant liquid used for household cleaning. I use this in the washing machine along with the normal liquid detergent and let me tell you,my clothes smell amazing after wash.  I would recommend you all to try this if you like strong menthol smell. I just love it.. 5 stars for the product.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Liquid-Menthol-Cool
amazon_reviews.review: Best for during this hot day and pain in ass corona virus. If  Want to feel fresh , add this on and take bath. Perfect to maintain ur  hygiene And feel fresh during this summer. Stay safe

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Liquid-Menthol-Cool
amazon_reviews.review: I am juz happy to tey this out. It has strong mint flavour with sweet essence balanced for my usage in bathroom. Stays perfectly long for washroom and bathroom specially places which are more closed and secluded. Its essense could be felt after 12 hrs also. Trust me. I seldomly rate anyone. Its a good for my daily usages. A change from orignal 30 years old flavour :-) try it.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Liquid-Menthol-Cool
amazon_reviews.review: Pretty cool and innovative stuff from Dettol. The minty flavor and then it gives tingling effects on the body.It's usually expensive than the lemon one but I suggest buy it when Amazon gives Especially Cloudtail India offers discount.  They are just amazing. You name it. They have it.Back to the product. That cool sensation with antiseptic is a must try and must buy.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Liquid-Menthol-Cool
amazon_reviews.review: This is a nice and innovative product from Reckitt Benckiser. Amazon deserves thanks because this is not available in local medicine shops. Those who are complaining that this is not as strong as the original Dettol Antiseptic Liquid are comparing apples and oranges. This scented Dettol Disinfectant Liquid is ideal for baths and imparting a freshness to just washed clothes.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Liquid-Menthol-Cool
amazon_reviews.review: Supply water in Delhi has foul smell, this liquid certainly makes that smell gone! Plus killing the germs!I use it daily for bathing and washing clothes too!Online deal is good as I bought this at discounted price!

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Liquid-Menthol-Cool
amazon_reviews.review: Every household needs Dettol products and especially those which have kids around.This new Dettol disinfectant with menthol fragrance leaves a fresh feeling and smell in your entire house when used along with cleaning water!Recommended for cleaning and washing.

amazon_reviews.name: Dettol-Disinfectant-Liquid-Menthol-Cool
amazon_reviews.review: Now I have tried all variants of dettol liquids and putting aside the added benefits of the antiseptic version, this one is the best among them. One capfull in a bucket of water and you will have the freshest of baths. Scent not as strong as antiseptic, but quite good. Recieved sealed bottle and next day delivery for prime and mfg date is the same month of order date, so really happy with the purchase.

amazon_reviews.review: Highest 'TFM' content grade 1 soap. Recommended by the doctors.Though Nivea launched it's own soap flagship in india few days back which is in fact might have beaten cinthol in terms of quality.But for the price range,cinthol is the best.The quality of the soap is determined by its 'TFM' content which is almost same in nivea and cinthol but nivea also moisturizes the skin from within along with the cleansing.Anyways,both are the best soaps available in the market just with a little price differences.Please don't use soaps like pears and all,they are fooling the indian customers with lowest 'tfm' content.Google it for more info!

amazon_reviews.name: Cinthol-Original-Soap-100g-Pack

amazon_reviews.name: Cinthol-Cool-Soap-100-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: I prefer cinthol soap amongst all the soaps available. Its fragrance is very good. This product 'Cinthol Cool' is so good. I have already used it thats why I ordered a pack of 8 Cinthol Cool soaps. Packaging is good and all the soaps are in good condition. You can also try 'Cinthol Confidence +' soap.

amazon_reviews.name: Cinthol-Cool-Soap-100-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: There's nothing extraordinary in this soap.. don't expect much for it's "cool" name tag..I didn't feel anything "cool" while using this soap..overall not that bad but also not that good.. fragrance is avg(to me)..

amazon_reviews.name: Cinthol-Cool-Soap-100-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: I have used different variants of cinthol but this one highly disappointed me. On the scale of 10 fragrance 2/10, Cooling effect 3/10 It melts very easily. I am not sure if it is original or not. I have stopped using this soap...I don't know what to do with the rest of them....

amazon_reviews.review: For Summers it's just great... Feels cool cool... And yeah fragnace lasts for long enough. Using for past 2years.

amazon_reviews.name: Cinthol-Confidence-Soap-100g-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: What a gem from an old and trusted Indian brand. And such great value for money.The fragrance is nice powdery scent which is refreshing without being overpowering. The soap’s cleansing is good, not great. But it has a nice creaminess which is far beyond its modest price. In fact, it has a nice natural creaminess, and not the slipperiness of a Dove. Also, it seems to long last. A clear winner and will be a regular feature on my bathing rack.

amazon_reviews.name: Cinthol-Confidence-Soap-100g-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: I liked the quality of the soap as it wasn't getting too chunky even if it stays wet for most part of the day. BUT, the DEO fragrance in body after taking bath with this soap *** All those are just marketing GIMMICKS. It's got no great fragrance than other soaps and actually it's just too minimal. Anyhow the product feels like of good quality.

amazon_reviews.name: Cinthol-Confidence-Soap-100g-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: I really had liked the packing of this soap. But more than that, I remember as soon as I had unpacked it, the surprising fresh smell coming from it was amazing.The soap foam feels soft, rich and white. It moisturizes the skin perfectly. I have an oily skin so I wanted a soap which can balance the skin moisture, not over moisturizing not drying out the skin. And this soap pretty much does that.Also, it lasts for a good time, also most soaps give up their foaming capability as soon as they become small, but this one still gives great lather. Would recommend to everyone.

amazon_reviews.name: Cinthol-Confidence-Soap-100g-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: Nice smelling scented bath soap from Cinthol. The scent lingers for a while even after washing off and leaves the bathroom also smelling great. Besides that it does its job of cleaning as it should. So full points there. Only thing is I was somewhat misguided and ordered a smaller pack when I needed a larger one.

amazon_reviews.name: Cinthol-Confidence-Soap-100g-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: Nice quality product. Great product. Buying all the product from Amazon Pantry regularly.Thank you Amazon for such great quality products at such an affordable rate.

amazon_reviews.name: Cinthol-Confidence-Soap-100g-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: I thought the product might be black or charcoal colour but it's a regular white one. The scent is not that great and didn't feel any difference btw normal average soap and this one. I feel the lime one is better than this. Its just a good marketing and nothing else.

amazon_reviews.name: Cinthol-Confidence-Soap-100g-Pack

amazon_reviews.name: Cinthol-Confidence-Soap-100g-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: The soap is ok for bathing, no scent at all, more drier. The green one from cinthol is much better.

amazon_reviews.name: Cinthol-Confidence-Soap-100g-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: For a long time I was searching for Indian soap equal to USA Ivory soap or the soap you get in Holiday Inn Hotels. Here it is!!!! Thank you Cinthol!

amazon_reviews.name: Cinthol-Confidence-Soap-100g-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: While the discount was only Rs 7, I have no complaints as Amazon delivered this in peak Covid-19. Thank you to the delivery person. Soap is tried and tested and one of the best available in India for summer season with the DEO.

amazon_reviews.name: Cinthol-Confidence-Soap-100g-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: What a gem from an old and trusted Indian brand. And such great value for money.The fragrance is nice powdery scent which is refreshing without being overpowering. The soap’s cleansing is good, not great. But it has a nice creaminess which is far beyond its modest price. In fact, it has a nice natural creaminess, and not the slipperiness of a Dove. Also, it seems to long last. A clear winner and will be a regular feature on my bathing rack.

amazon_reviews.name: Cinthol-Confidence-Soap-100g-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: I liked the quality of the soap as it wasn't getting too chunky even if it stays wet for most part of the day. BUT, the DEO fragrance in body after taking bath with this soap *** All those are just marketing GIMMICKS. It's got no great fragrance than other soaps and actually it's just too minimal. Anyhow the product feels like of good quality.

amazon_reviews.name: Cinthol-Confidence-Soap-100g-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: I really had liked the packing of this soap. But more than that, I remember as soon as I had unpacked it, the surprising fresh smell coming from it was amazing.The soap foam feels soft, rich and white. It moisturizes the skin perfectly. I have an oily skin so I wanted a soap which can balance the skin moisture, not over moisturizing not drying out the skin. And this soap pretty much does that.Also, it lasts for a good time, also most soaps give up their foaming capability as soon as they become small, but this one still gives great lather. Would recommend to everyone.

amazon_reviews.name: Cinthol-Confidence-Soap-100g-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: Nice smelling scented bath soap from Cinthol. The scent lingers for a while even after washing off and leaves the bathroom also smelling great. Besides that it does its job of cleaning as it should. So full points there. Only thing is I was somewhat misguided and ordered a smaller pack when I needed a larger one.

amazon_reviews.name: Cinthol-Confidence-Soap-100g-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: Nice quality product. Great product. Buying all the product from Amazon Pantry regularly.Thank you Amazon for such great quality products at such an affordable rate.

amazon_reviews.name: Cinthol-Cool-Soap-100g-Free
amazon_reviews.review: After blindly using this soap for *years* it suddenly struck me that there is zero cooling effect in this soap now and by now I mean 2-3 years.I started using cinthol cool 6-7 years ago as a kid when I used to think how awesome is this soap (with that tingling cooling after sensation) I felt that this soap is way underrated because of that and the signature smell of it. But now I have realised that the cooling part is ZERO. And the fragrance is bland and doesn't last long.Either this soap is fake because I've been continuously ordering this soap online in saver pack of 4/5 soaps from Amazon (but the seller being a trusty one at that 🤔) or Godrej has changed the chemical composition of this soap.Either Godrej should bring a "stronger" version of cinthol cool soap or I should look for better alternatives because this soap isn't what it used to be once.

amazon_reviews.name: Cinthol-Cool-Soap-100g-Free
amazon_reviews.review: I bought this product because I was experiencing some bad prickly heat and thought the menthol would help. Although I don't feel the 'minty' feeling I was hoping for, I am still well pleased. The scent is very nice and refreshing but not over-bearing like it should only be used by MALES, not medicinal smelling. I don't feel as though my skin is dry and cracking off. And the prickly heat symptoms are gone. I like this product, I will be suggesting it to my friends and family.

amazon_reviews.name: Cinthol-Cool-Soap-100g-Free
amazon_reviews.review: ONE OF THE WORST PRODUCTS WHICH I RECEIVED. THIS CINTHOL BATH COOL SOAP HAS NO FRAGRANCE, NO COOL EFFECTS AT ALL. SHOULD NOT PURCHASED BY ANYBODY. THE PACKET IS SHOWING THE DATE IS 01.2020. BUT I THINK IT MUCH MUCH OLDER DUE TO IT'S NO FRAGRANCE. I CANNOT RETURN IT BECAUSE I AM TRYING TO USE ONE OF THIS.

amazon_reviews.name: Cinthol-Cool-Soap-100g-Free
amazon_reviews.review: In television advertisement, the color of the soap is shown as transparent as glass.But when I bought it, the color of the soap was in blue shade.I had to buy around 5 soaps.This is totally a cheating experience by the manufacturer.Did not expect such a fraud experience.

amazon_reviews.name: Cinthol-Cool-Soap-100g-Free
amazon_reviews.review: Decent Soap. Very fresh and nice. Gives good amount of lather. But not the best flavor of Cinthol according to me. I like other flavors better. Cinthol is my fav soap. 😊

amazon_reviews.name: Cinthol-Cool-Soap-100g-Free
amazon_reviews.review: Has absolutely no perfume at all... and it is blue in colour not transparent from as it is shown in Cinthol Ad.Total waste

amazon_reviews.review: This soap fluxes so fast even when you put it in a separate soap case and when you apply that melted soap, some part of it is stuck on your body specially on chest region and if you have large chest hair it will trouble you later.

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Hair-Serum-Gloss-100ml
amazon_reviews.review: This is not the same product as advertised. I received a Steax Vitariche gloss serum instead of Streax pro Vitagloss as the product name suggests. Called CS to get the refund and since i had closed my bank account since the order was placed i wanted the refund to come through amazon pay. However Amazon rep Aniket and the supervisor Krishna were absolutely unhelpful and went against common sense to keep telling me that the refund will only be processed to the closed bank account and the bank will issue me a DD. When i called them out on their lack of common sense they kept repeating themselves. Finally decided to give away the product than to deal with Amazon for a refund. This shows how base Amazon’s customer service is and a good sign for all to avoid using Amazon if you value your money and time.

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Hair-Serum-Gloss-100ml
amazon_reviews.review: No doubt, product is awesome and available at very reasonable price in comparison to other serums and even better than those.But Amazon or Streax, can you tell me how to extract it without it's upper cap??Obviously, It may be a fault either by Manufacturing Company or Amazon while packaging.But overall, I am not finding a solution that how to popup serum out of the bottle?

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Hair-Serum-Gloss-100ml
amazon_reviews.review: Best serum ....smell is toooo good...I realy liked a lott...just take a small quatity f serum and aply al over the hair before u go fr straighten...as per the description it realy protect the hair from damage...thumbs up fr the product

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Hair-Serum-Gloss-100ml
amazon_reviews.review: Minimal effort required to tame frizzy hair with this serum. Hair has nice shiny smooth look and soft to touch. Pleasant scent. Has same good effect on damp hair as well as completely dried hair. Overall 'thumbs up' for this product.

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Hair-Serum-Gloss-100ml
amazon_reviews.review: I've used this serum on my normal hair and chemically straightened hair, as well as seen results on colored hair. And honestly at this price, it never disappointed me. Though the texture is quite thin compared to a lot of other hair serums, but I like how it does not feel heavy on my hair and just a pump of it is enough to dab on my medium length hair. This does the basic job of a hair serum from detangling to providing moisture to the ends of the hair and since it goes a long way, so thumbs up from my side. And to my surprise, the new variant - vitariche gloss is way better than the previous one and this comes with nutty fragrance, which I totally love!

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Hair-Serum-Gloss-100ml
amazon_reviews.review: In the package the product did not have a cap as shown in the picture and naturally it was leaking in the box. and I can not be sure of the originality of the same!This item is not returnable by policy, which is understood by nature of the product. But in these cases there should be option to return damaged product. Had bought the item from cloudtail so do expect better experience.

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Hair-Serum-Gloss-100ml
amazon_reviews.review: It actually provides a very shiny effect while protecting your hair.And it leaves them with a very pleasant fragrance  💕💕💕💕

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Hair-Serum-Gloss-100ml
amazon_reviews.review: I’ve been using this serum for past couple of years and have purchased it for the sixth time recently so was forced to drop a comment automatically. This is the best serum available for the purpose. I’ve got thick hair so before applying wax or blow drying, I need something to protect them and it serves the purpose really well.

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Hair-Serum-Gloss-100ml
amazon_reviews.review: Worth its price. Make hair soft and silky and last more than 2 days.The way I discovered this was I had applied this after bath to get ready for a function, it gives a finishing shine to my hairs. Next day as well I don’t need to put extra serum.Amazon delivered this product without any leakage/spills whatsoever... thank you Amazon ans the seller.

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Ultralights-Highlighting-Kit-Collection
amazon_reviews.review: Someone like me had always fancied upon getting some of my hair getting coloured when I see some people with colored or highlighted hair.Going to parlor or salon has always been hard on budget if you are living in a working middle class family.Finally I decided to get 2 packets of this hair highlighter after doing some research and surfing various Youtube videos.Coming to this product let me review as under:Pros:1  Gives good color/highlights if kept for about 45 minutes. (note: 30 minutes is not enough if you have dark black hair).2 The color stays for about 8-9 months and lightens with time.3 After about 1-1.5 months of applying this hair color, I would suggest to use henna/mehendi for about 1 hour in all you hairs...which will not only nourish your hair, but also give very good result for highlighted hairs.4 Personal tip- If you are not satisfied with colored/highlighted hair and want to remove it, use anti-dandruff shampoo 3-4 times while washing your hair. Also the Godrej hair dye (black) available in powder sachet is also effective in removing the highlights.Cons:1 One sachet is not enough even for short hair. Purchase 2 sachets if you want proper results. (note: if you are a girl with shoulder length hair or more, I would suggest 3 sachets).2 Does not give too much highlighted effect if you want to get noticed from others with normal hair.3 Just like any other chemical hair color, it damages you hair and makes your hair rough.Verdict:It is ok to give this a try once if you want to color/highlight your hair at home. I would rather suggest spending few bucks and get your hair highlighted in parlor or salon for better results.If you find my review helpful, please click the YES/HELPFUL button! 👍

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Ultralights-Highlighting-Kit-Collection
amazon_reviews.review: Best hair highlighter!  Loved it. Perfect for brown hair girls!  It stays for a long time. No damage, no dullness or frizzy hair.. The conditioner provided by streax is just awesome.. Makes your hair colour look more glossy and shiny. Smoothed out the hair..

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Ultralights-Highlighting-Kit-Collection
amazon_reviews.review: I'm looking like tigress.  I love it.  😘😘

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Ultralights-Highlighting-Kit-Collection
amazon_reviews.review: You don’t need to pay extra in salons when u have this. I just love this colour. But if you have long hair then you need two packets of this as such the quantity is less. Other than you can see everything in the picture. I just love the way it turned out.

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Ultralights-Highlighting-Kit-Collection
amazon_reviews.review: Very nice product,,, easy too use with gud colout

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Ultralights-Highlighting-Kit-Collection
amazon_reviews.review: This color is not for highlighting natural hair. It can highlight only bleached hair. And this kit does not contain blond powder to bleach the hair. It contains only developer and color. I applied it and it didn't give me any visible result on my natural hair, although it can be seen in sunlight. But I didn't get the color I desired.

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Ultralights-Highlighting-Kit-Collection
amazon_reviews.review: Did It my on  ends, gives  beautiful  colour  used style 1 n 2 both 1  is brown ( lesser time)  to orangish  if  kept  fr  long and 2  is orange  to golden. U can experience storbing  at home  with  it at cheap  rate with great  results.. Use it  with Britt or simply  wherever u want  with gloved ✋  N it doesn't  damge  hair  just  takecare that  u oil  or  spa  it regularly as lighter hair  tends to look rough.  Go for it ,follow instructions given  for usage..change  ur look  in Mts.

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Ultralights-Highlighting-Kit-Collection
amazon_reviews.review: Its a nightmare!!!!!!Trust me, I stuck to each and every direction written on the leaflet, and after almost 2 hours of blonder-shampoo-color-shampoo routine, my entire hair turned orange!!!! That too, not a funky orange. Just the badly-done-henna orange, if you know what I mean.I have tried blue and green and blonde hair color previously, semi+permanent and permanent, but never did I think that a safe color like cappucino brown will turn out to be such a disaster!!!!!!!!Had to order another color just to cover this mess up. Frantically searching for scarfs andhats right now.

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Ultralights-Highlighting-Kit-Collection
amazon_reviews.review: Product is good , but the final color is not it must be , it is reddish color

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Ultralights-Highlighting-Kit-Collection
amazon_reviews.review: Overall Streax Ultralights Hair Color in Style 2 is an extremely affordable and easy to use at home, complete hair highlighting kit. On colored hair it adds a vibrant shade ranging from light brown to golden without causing any hair damage.

Also the Godrej hair dye (black) available in powder sachet is also effective in removing the highlights.Cons:1 One sachet is not enough even for short hair. Purchase 2 sachets if you want proper results. (note: if you are a girl with shoulder length hair or more, I would suggest 3 sachets).2 Does not give too much highlighted effect if you want to get noticed from others with normal hair.3 Just like any other chemical hair color, it damages you hair and makes your hair rough.Verdict:It is ok to give this a try once if you want to color/highlight your hair at home. I would rather suggest spending few bucks and get your hair highlighted in parlor or salon for better results.If you find my review helpful, please click the YES/HELPFUL button! 👍

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Ultralights-Highlighting-Kit-Collection
amazon_reviews.review: Best hair highlighter!  Loved it. Perfect for brown hair girls!  It stays for a long time. No damage, no dullness or frizzy hair.. The conditioner provided by streax is just awesome.. Makes your hair colour look more glossy and shiny. Smoothed out the hair..

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Ultralights-Highlighting-Kit-Collection
amazon_reviews.review: This color is not for highlighting natural hair. It can highlight only bleached hair. And this kit does not contain blond powder to bleach the hair. It contains only developer and color. I applied it and it didn't give me any visible result on my natural hair, although it can be seen in sunlight. But I didn't get the color I desired.

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Ultralights-Highlighting-Kit-Collection
amazon_reviews.review: Did It my on  ends, gives  beautiful  colour  used style 1 n 2 both 1  is brown ( lesser time)  to orangish  if  kept  fr  long and 2  is orange  to golden. U can experience storbing  at home  with  it at cheap  rate with great  results.. Use it  with Britt or simply  wherever u want  with gloved ✋  N it doesn't  damge  hair  just  takecare that  u oil  or  spa  it regularly as lighter hair  tends to look rough.  Go for it ,follow instructions given  for usage..change  ur look  in Mts.

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Ultralights-Highlighting-Kit-Collection
amazon_reviews.review: Its a nightmare!!!!!!Trust me, I stuck to each and every direction written on the leaflet, and after almost 2 hours of blonder-shampoo-color-shampoo routine, my entire hair turned orange!!!! That too, not a funky orange. Just the badly-done-henna orange, if you know what I mean.I have tried blue and green and blonde hair color previously, semi+permanent and permanent, but never did I think that a safe color like cappucino brown will turn out to be such a disaster!!!!!!!!Had to order another color just to cover this mess up. Frantically searching for scarfs andhats right now.

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Ultralights-Highlighting-Kit-Collection
amazon_reviews.review: Product is good , but the final color is not it must be , it is reddish color

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Ultralights-Highlighting-Kit-Collection
amazon_reviews.review: Overall Streax Ultralights Hair Color in Style 2 is an extremely affordable and easy to use at home, complete hair highlighting kit. On colored hair it adds a vibrant shade ranging from light brown to golden without causing any hair damage.

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Professional-Hold-Funkey-Colour
amazon_reviews.review: Gurl, don't buy this if you don't want to bleach your hair. My hair used to be a really dark brown, so it's black now. Not even a tint of purple. Hair dyes normally don't show up dark hair naturally. You either bleach your hair and lie it die or use a REALLY BRIGHT HAIR DYE AND PRAY FOR THE HAIR LORDS TO BLESS YOUR FACE.

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Professional-Hold-Funkey-Colour
amazon_reviews.review: Dont know for how long it will stay colour is nice only if used on properly bleached hair else won't be visible. Streax other items are not that highly priced its reasonable unlike this one. For this tubr 300 is fine.

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Professional-Hold-Funkey-Colour
amazon_reviews.review: Absolutely perfect product, delivers exactly as described. No flaws. Very pleasant smell and works like a wonder. Just follow instructions exactly. And do lighten hair with bleach.Advice- do wear gloves as volume will stain skin.Small criticism- bottle had little less product to colour all my hair as I have quite thick and long hair. But can easily get two bottles and it’s perfect

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Professional-Hold-Funkey-Colour
amazon_reviews.review: It's a very rich purple. More red hued but does it's work.Semi permanentI really disliked it's smell.Very strong!

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Professional-Hold-Funkey-Colour
amazon_reviews.review: I love the longetivity of this product , this is the only purple I could find out of every semi permanent dyes out there.This is my first time using this product and it turned out really pretty , but I had to bleach my hair twice and it is very important to bleach your hair to level 8 or above (total blonde) ..do not dilute the colour and always take 1:2 ratio of blonder and developer to get the best results

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Professional-Hold-Funkey-Colour
amazon_reviews.review: I've been trying to get purple hair since so long! Wanted to get rid of green hair without bleach washing and directly applied the purple dye over the green hair. I was really surprised when the colour turned out the way I wanted!Really great quality and quantity for 450 rs. Very happy with the purchase! The smell is a bit strong, but pleasant. More red undertones than blue.

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Professional-Hold-Funkey-Colour
amazon_reviews.review: Doesn't work without bleach ....why are u selling a colour without bleach then include it ...too much high price

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Professional-Hold-Funkey-Colour
amazon_reviews.review: The product colour doesn't stay for a long time.Need to apply every 2weeks once.Rather than that no other flaws. The colour is vibrant. Need to Bleach your hair before using it.

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Professional-Hold-Funkey-Colour
amazon_reviews.review: Nice purple. Doesn’t stay for too long. Pretty good. Colored extremely dark hair. Buy hair bleach and developer with it.

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Professional-Hold-Funkey-Colour
amazon_reviews.review: The blue came out great! I have dark brown hair and bleached it twice (with volume 30 developer) before applying the colour. Left the colour on for 45-60 minutes. My hair (which felt very rough after bleaching) became much softer after rinsing off the colour. I also used the Crazy Violet (can see it in the pic). Have previously used Manic Panic hair colour which is 4 times the price, and a lot less effective. Would definitely recommend this range from Streax :D

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Professional-Hold-Funkey-Colour
amazon_reviews.review: Very vibrant colour and fade away after a monthl , perfect electric blue 👌👌😎,but you have to bleach your hair twice before applying itIt works on atleast level 10 hair 😎

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Professional-Hold-Funkey-Colour
amazon_reviews.review: Came out a beautiful colour on my level 9 hair even though I diluted it with conditioner to increase the quantity. Would've been stunning if I didn't have to do that! Try to increase the time between washes as you can noticeably see it fade after every wash. Give your hair a blast of cold water after showering to lock the cuticle or the colour will bleed over your neck, clothes, everywhere until it dries.

amazon_reviews.name: Streax-Professional-Hold-Funkey-Colour
amazon_reviews.review: It gives this color on lifting your black hair to level 5-6..I guess the streax gems collection is much better than this single tube color

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-Moisturizing-Aloe-Vera-200ml
amazon_reviews.review: Product is just awesome..  If u have dry skin,  then this is the right one for u...  Mine is damn dry skin and it is working just awesome unlike other face wash..  Even Himalaya neem face is not that good like aloevera one...

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-Moisturizing-Aloe-Vera-200ml
amazon_reviews.review: This is superb! I love it from the day I started using it. It works like a charm. My skin is as soft as that of a new born baby and I receive loads of compliments day in and day out for this. Thank You so much, Himalaya Herbals. A big thanks to Amazon for the lovely packing and packaging of the product as well as timely delivery. If you found my review helpful, please click on helpful and let me know. Divine Thanks. BLESSED BE!!

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-Moisturizing-Aloe-Vera-200ml
amazon_reviews.review: I regularly buy products from Amazon.in, but this was for the 1st time I had to face disappointment. Upon opening the package I found that the Himalaya  moisturizing Aloe Vera face wash was missing by half.😱

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-Moisturizing-Aloe-Vera-200ml
amazon_reviews.review: Bought this product and delivered yesterday (6th Aug). Delivery and Packaging is superb as always.Regarding face wash: Suitable for dry face only. Therefore not recommended for other skin types. Kind of sticky and thus does not gives clean look.

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-Moisturizing-Aloe-Vera-200ml
amazon_reviews.review: Initially I thought this face wash is waste of money as it doesn't lather at all but used it for a month anyways. I have started noticing a lot of difference in my skin. This made my skin very soft n all the dry patches I had on my face have reduced as this doesn't dry your skin rather hydrate your skin along with cleaning it... Best face wash for people with sensitive n dry skin.

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-Moisturizing-Aloe-Vera-200ml
amazon_reviews.review: First impression : lathers very poorly. It's like applying lotion and washing it off. But well lack of foam doesn't necessarily mean it's not cleaning my skin.Second impression after washing : mmm skin does feel better,will try using it againFinal impression after using it some more : Very good 👍. It really does moisturize your skin. Perfect for dry skin, specially in harsh winter.I've very dry and sensitive skin so i need a very good moisturising  skin care routine specially in winter months. My sensitive skin does not agree with random products bought off the shelf. I tried this in 100ml tube as it's herbal and I liked as it really does moisturize my dry skin so I bought this 200ml pack from Amazon.I removed a star though as it's outlet is so big ,a very generous amount plops out in single pump and you end up finishing it up way faster as compared to other face wash( the 100ml tube had a very generous outlet too).

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-Moisturizing-Aloe-Vera-200ml
amazon_reviews.review: I loved this face wash, nice clean feel  post the use. I mostly used high end face products coz I have dry skin and what we usually get in the market is for oily skin but this is my new fav.  Well done Himalaya 👍🏼

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-Moisturizing-Aloe-Vera-200ml
amazon_reviews.review: A very good product for winters for extremely dry skin,smells gud,leaves your skin soft and supple n pea size product is enough and to be used on wet face gives a little lather,,,,,a very good facewash for this price,,,have been using from one month now.
