amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-Baby-Shampoo-400-ml
amazon_reviews.review: I bought 100ml pack at local shop to try it and I loved the fragrance and it leaves my baby hair smooth with a lovely lingering smell. So I ordered a 400ml pack at Amazon @Rs.168.The one I bought at local store is very thick,with almost gel like consistency, doesn't even spill out even if the cap is open and lying down,have to really squeeze it out. But the one I bought from Amazon is so watery and runny. Spills out in an instant without even squeezing bottle.There is no seal on bottle so there's no telling if the content is genuine or tampered with,maybe diluted, who knows.

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-Baby-Shampoo-400-ml
amazon_reviews.review: Hai guys...!👋The product arrived within one of ordering so Thumsup Amazon for that.🏆Positives-:👇✓Received a brand new product.(Mfg date-:03/18)✓Smells smooth and heavenly✓No skin irritation or any other allergic reactions.✓The strength of this shampoo was so mild.(The kid was not even crying during his bath)✓Cheaper than the local retail stores👉Thanks 4 reading..!👈

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-Baby-Shampoo-400-ml
amazon_reviews.review: I have been holding off on buying shampoo for my kids b/c even the "natural" shampoos have tons of chemicals and cause dandruff in their hair. This shampoo is wonderful - it's very gentle and smells good too!Their scalps were not irritated by it so it's good for sensitive skin.Very good product from amazon

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-Baby-Shampoo-400-ml
amazon_reviews.review: Being a mom I am very peculiar about the cosmetics I use for my baby and I always try to use non chemical based cosmetics for my baby.I have tried few so called big foreign brands before but results were below average and at last tried himalaya baby shampoo and the results were just astonishing.All thr natural oil of my babies hairs were abck to normal, hairs were were soft, hardly any itching in eyes.It's a must buy products for all thr moms who love their babies.5 🌟 🌟 🌟 🌟 🌟 product

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-Baby-Shampoo-400-ml
amazon_reviews.review: I used this for  my own hair  and its actually good for the times when u r having trouble with ur hair and nothingsuits ur hair is falling off soits better to use something as mild as the baby shampoo! This gives shine and makes ur hair soft but dont rely on this shampoo for removing oil from ur hair this is way mild for  that !

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-Baby-Shampoo-400-ml
amazon_reviews.review: I have curly hair and am recovering from heat damage hence went natural about 3 months ago. Needed CG friendly shampoo and this one does the job.The consistency is thick like any other shampoo and it is a clear liquid. Since it is a baby shampoo, if you are an adult you may require a good 10 ml shampoo for one time use.Given the price it is worth it.  Leaves hair and scalp feeling clean.

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-Baby-Shampoo-400-ml
amazon_reviews.review: There is nothing gentle about this shampoo. Himalaya does not disclose its entire ingredient list and contains methylchloroisothiazolinone which is proven to toxic. Why cheat consumers like this!

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-Baby-Shampoo-400-ml
amazon_reviews.review: From Amazon they send my package very safely so it m happy with their services but this shampoo is not suitable for adults i ordered it for myself (btw i m 20) and u can't believe how horrible it's result is, actually i ordered it for decreasing my hair fall but using 1time my hair fall increase horribly and my hair became so sticky that i can't explain....i never use that shampoo after that it was just a waste of money

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-Baby-Shampoo-400-ml
amazon_reviews.review: Don't know if just our bottle was duplicate or not, as it was discounted and my son and daughter had instant hair loss. Threw it out and reverted to Johnson and the hair loss stopped after another 2 days. Will not use this again

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-Baby-Shampoo-400-ml
amazon_reviews.review: Great shampoo! Sulfate free, mild, soothing fragrance. Make sure you take a lot more than you usually do for it to feel sufficient. Also, rub your palms together to create a soft lather and then rub on to scalp/hair. This is important. Really useful to those with curly hair. Gentle enough for your little one.

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-4003F-Baby-Lotion-400ml
amazon_reviews.review: Very Nice Product . It is very light weighted and quickly gets absorbed so that you don't feel  creamy when you get out using this. It gives a smooth feeling to our skin and will not irritated your skin at all. This product is a lotion and not a moisturizer so it is not a replaced for that this is baby lotion too. It works very well for your skin.As this is not an oily lotion which will not make you sweat even in hot summer It  smells  good and leaves skin smooth afterwards.  Even though this is a baby lotion people with very sensitive skin can also use this one as it is good for damaged skin too. After using for many months i can say it rebuilds your skin.Himalaya is now not using Paraben for Baby lotion so the lotion is safe than before. This lotion is not greesy at all. Please go for Original product as duplicates are out there.

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-4003F-Baby-Lotion-400ml
amazon_reviews.review: I bought this for myself because it came up under a search for vegan lotion. However, I will continue buying it because it is so lightweight and quickly absorbed. I live in the desert and am impressed by how much it hydrates my skin.Thank you Amazon

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-4003F-Baby-Lotion-400ml
amazon_reviews.review: This is one of the best baby lotion in Market. I got this at Rs.67 only. As it is from Himalaya, I need not to write anything about quality as Himalaya products are always best in class.

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-4003F-Baby-Lotion-400ml
amazon_reviews.review: Best product for kids

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-4003F-Baby-Lotion-400ml
amazon_reviews.review: I've ordered it 3 times and likely to order again. Unlike the 400ml Himalaya gentle baby shampoo or gentle baby bath which has no seals, this lotion comes in clear laminated sealed pack and I've received it in good condition and packing all the 3 times I ordered. Although it's tad light it's okay for baby skin. I love it's fragrance, leaves my baby smelling nice and I use it myself too but it's too light for my dry skin,but of course it's meant mainly for babies.One winning feature about this particular 400ml pack is it's pump feature,makes it lot easier to literally use it singlehandedly which comes in real handy if you've to hold a squirming wriggling baby with your other hand!Update : I've ordered my 9th bottle! Initially seller give one bottle but nowadays the minimum quantity is 2 bottles. But it's okay,your baby is going to use it every day and they come with very good shelf life so you finish them long before it's expiry date.

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-Herbals-Baby-Lotion-400ml
amazon_reviews.review: Although it doesn't make your skin super soft or anything, it does a pretty good job.It gets absorbed into your skin pretty quickly with minimal effort.It also forms a protective layer until your next shower.And I like how it's free from parabens and mineral oil.An ideal light weight moisturizer for non-winter months.The smell reminds me a bit of guava.

amazon_reviews.review: i bought this cream for my mom and ladies believe me its work great more then fancy costly  creams but yes its oily but thts ok bcs of result....i wish a serum in same series...thanx amazon ad himalaya..pls like yes if u love my review bcs its free for u.

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-Herbals-Anti-Wrinkle-Cream
amazon_reviews.review: I was using Himalaya moisturized 8 years back and my skin was really good, soft and gentle. After I moved to Hyderabad I moved to different products like Olay, Ponds, Lotus, Maybelline, Lakme etc. I wasn't happy with any of them. but this Anti aging cream is awesome, in a weeks time I can see and feel the difference in my skin, its very light and light smell. Totally like this cream.

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-Herbals-Anti-Wrinkle-Cream
amazon_reviews.review: I have ordered this product for my Mom. And she is very happy with the results after using this product.It does works nicely to reduce your wrinkles if you will apply it on daily bases.At least use this twice in a day, if you really want to improve your skin tone.What I liked the most about this product:#####################################👌Its fragrance is good.👌Made up with natural ingredients, So it won't harm to your skin.👌Comes with a very cheaper price if we will  compare to other related brands.👌JUST go for this product if you are suffering from wrinkle problem.####################################GO for it.Its a value for money product under budget.🤗

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-Herbals-Anti-Wrinkle-Cream
amazon_reviews.review: I got this for my mom because of the reviews and, to be honest, because of its low price. My mom has been applying it with great dedication every night for over 2 months now (had it ordered 2 times). I can’t say I have seen much of a difference. The least a cream can do is moisturize, but this cream doesn’t work as a moisturizer either. Again, I might be wrong and because my mom has just started using aging creams while she should have started at least some 10 years ago. But, I would really recommend going with better options. And people in the same predicament as mine, can you please suggest me creams that might work?

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-Herbals-Anti-Wrinkle-Cream
amazon_reviews.review: So nice product, my skin is combination type (oily n dry), it works magically especially in winter. Gives u Extra softness..

amazon_reviews.name: Himalaya-Herbals-Anti-Wrinkle-Cream
amazon_reviews.review: My mom changed from ponds day n night cream  after ages and the result is so good.

amazon_reviews.review: I was bit skeptical about this cream as I was not sure this is good for my age group or not. After using this for about a week I can say that this one is great cream for anyone who is 25+. It's very moisturising so if you have oily skin like I do, little is more. I love to mix it with few drops of rose water n massage my face for a min or so.

amazon_reviews.review: I would like to give five stars. Really amazing work on wrinkles. I am using my third bottle. But apply it on wrinkles before going to sleep. Apply little thicker. You can see the amazing results. Those who are worried about their wrinkles go for it. I got it for 165rs.

amazon_reviews.review: Earlier" society "tea powder is Good in quality and flavour but after "society "comes in society its quality degraded and amlagmation of dust in "chaipatti " dettered its qiality.we hope for best from "society "to best for society

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Regular-Pouch-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: I'm a milk-tea addicted person. Although, I control it upto thrice day but sometimes it may exceed 5.Since I like milk-tea alot, I have tried many Dust-teas available in the market.I've tried and tasted Wagh-bakri, brookebond, Taj, society, maharsthra chai, maa-beti Chai & you name it.I liked the society tea alot. This tea when boiled in the water gives a nice flavor and the color which no other teas can give.The packaging was nice. I ordered for a 1kg pack directly since I already knew about the taste.From the value for money standpoint, it is a little costlier (20-30 Rs per kg)  in comparison to its other teas of its class. But you will find it worth it. Just make sure you use a correct method to prepare to get the best out of it.Method in the sense, first boil it in water and then add milk.Directly adding into milk will also give you the good taste but the colour will fade away in that case.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Regular-Pouch-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: Received this product in damaged condition and it doesn’t come under returnable category. Since the seal is broken can’t use the product

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Regular-Pouch-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: We are A family of tea drinkers and found it to be the best ever had.Been faithful to Tata tea gold since it got launched but had to buy society tea when our brand was not available during lockdown and found it to be better than Tata tea gold.Where Tata tea gold has longer leaf this one looks like any other tea but once the tea is brewed the colour and taste was as strong as Tata tea gold. Not a percent less.Price was also similar to Tata tea gold. Henceforth we are going to buy whichever brand is on discount online.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Regular-Pouch-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: Tea above rs. 400 per kg should not contain dust..At the rate 400/-, why to add dust with ctc granules.. Its a 100% margin business, still the company providing sub standard ctc instead of bopsm.. I will not going yo buy it again

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Regular-Pouch-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: I'm a milk-tea addicted person. Although, I control it upto thrice day but sometimes it may exceed 5.Since I like milk-tea alot, I have tried many Dust-teas available in the market.I've tried and tasted Wagh-bakri, brookebond, Taj, society, maharsthra chai, maa-beti Chai & you name it.I liked the society tea alot. This tea when boiled in the water gives a nice flavor and the color which no other teas can give.The packaging was nice. I ordered for a 1kg pack directly since I already knew about the taste.From the value for money standpoint, it is a little costlier (20-30 Rs per kg)  in comparison to its other teas of its class. But you will find it worth it. Just make sure you use a correct method to prepare to get the best out of it.Method in the sense, first boil it in water and then add milk.Directly adding into milk will also give you the good taste but the colour will fade away in that case.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Regular-Pouch-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: Received this product in damaged condition and it doesn’t come under returnable category. Since the seal is broken can’t use the product

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Regular-Pouch-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: We are A family of tea drinkers and found it to be the best ever had.Been faithful to Tata tea gold since it got launched but had to buy society tea when our brand was not available during lockdown and found it to be better than Tata tea gold.Where Tata tea gold has longer leaf this one looks like any other tea but once the tea is brewed the colour and taste was as strong as Tata tea gold. Not a percent less.Price was also similar to Tata tea gold. Henceforth we are going to buy whichever brand is on discount online.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Regular-Pouch-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: Tea above rs. 400 per kg should not contain dust..At the rate 400/-, why to add dust with ctc granules.. Its a 100% margin business, still the company providing sub standard ctc instead of bopsm.. I will not going yo buy it again

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Regular-Pouch-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: Society tea by far is the best brand in terms of taste, colour and flavour. I'm using this brand of tea since ages, maybe more than 15 years. Infact I dont buy any other tea except Society. But this time Im not satisfied with my buy as no discounts were offered.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Regular-Pouch-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: Product is fine. Package had a hole in it & tea powder leaked out.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Regular-Pouch-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: Society Masala Tea is far better than this one. Pack within expiry but due to storage conditions discolored.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Regular-Pouch-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: I am using this tea for last 7 year.  Getting this product in bangalore is not easy. Sometime it will be avaialble. Happy to get this product through Amazon.Tea flavour is too good.  After having Society tea, we are not fine in having any other tea :)To get the proper flavour, boil it in water well then add milk.  Sometime i use this tea decoction for hair conditioning also. So pure.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Regular-Pouch-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: It’s perfect and this 500 gm mini pouch i purchased to gift a friend of mine😍I had ordered one kg jar in jan and second one has just arrived yesterday...do i need to say more???Perfect taste of Chai ...!

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Masala-Jar-250g
amazon_reviews.review: Recently, I visited a relative in Dubai and tasted Society Masala tea for the 1st time.  I simply loved it, more so when I found real ingredients like cinnamon, cardamom, ginger etc. written on the box.  I ordered same tea in india once I got back and I am shocked to see that there are no real ingredients.  The box says there are added 'flovors' only.  How disgusting to find that what is sold in india and exported abroad is totally different.  I wish I could return the tea but unfortunately, Amazon does not accept return of food items.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Masala-Jar-250g
amazon_reviews.review: Excellent product as its smell,taste and flavour... Every customer who have idea about tea take it without dought ...drink with milk or without milk. Thank you my Amazon and thank you seller... I am very satisfied.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Masala-Jar-250g
amazon_reviews.review: Very good one. Tastes awesome. But the product has come in a plastic water bottle which is free. The plastic is very cheap and the smell of plastic is there in the tea also. Had to empty the contents to a better container. Earlier the container the tea came was very good. This time they have changed it to a water bottle.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Masala-Jar-250g
amazon_reviews.review: The tea is good. But old stock. Packed on October 2016. Best before 12 months of packing. So it's already outdated when received.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Masala-Jar-250g
amazon_reviews.review: The tea is great but the delivery charges ruins the whole taste and it feels iy aint orth it. 130 is MRP & 120 is Delivery charges which make it double the price, thus not worth it.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Masala-Jar-250g
amazon_reviews.review: This masla tea is best in taste and aroma.I purchased four  different  companies  masala tea to compare the taste .l found test of Society masala  over and above three companies  masala tea.Further a small quantity  of  tea leaves  require to prepare  aromic tasty tea.I am continuously  purchasing this tea now.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Masala-Jar-250g
amazon_reviews.review: When I made my first brew I got impressed by the smell only. The smell was really nice and above all masala was thoroughly mixed within the tea leaves which release it's taste and aroma when water boils. Delivery was fine and instead of box I got a very beautiful sipper which made my day.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Masala-Jar-250g
amazon_reviews.review: The which has been sent looks like it's a fake product as there are lumps in it ... plus there a foul smell coming out of it please take it back and refund my money

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Masala-Jar-250g
amazon_reviews.review: Good but very spicy. Young people will like it but for old/children it is very strong.If mixed with normal tea then better.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Masala-Jar-250g
amazon_reviews.review: Good for the first time use. Later you get irritated due to the spices. May be they should have added more cardamom

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Minute-Masala-500g
amazon_reviews.review: When you need just one cup of tea and are too lazy to go through the whole rigmarole, this product is a lifesaver!Just heat water (optionally, add some milk for a richer taste) in a cup in the microwave, then drop in a heaped scoop of this premix. Voila, your tea is ready - no utensils to wash, no gas needed, no tea leaves to throw and no tea filter to clean.Decent in taste, full marks for convenience, this is a must-have in my kitchen.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Minute-Masala-500g
amazon_reviews.review: There are ten sachets in the pack along with measuring cup for 100ml water. You can make one cup tea per sachet. Taste is individual's preference. But I found tea made from Girnar's sachets more tasty.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Minute-Masala-500g
amazon_reviews.review: This is perfect for travellers and lazy people only thing u need to do is take hot water mix powder and awesome masala tea is ready(make sure u follow instructions and mix it in right proportion as instructed).It's a must if u are travelling and u can't live without good tea.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Minute-Masala-500g
amazon_reviews.review: I didn't like the taste of it. Too sweet and while I do like sweets, not in my tea. I bought it because I couldn't get my regular one and that this was from Society, and yet I discarded it after just trying it once. So you can imagine how much I hated it. But to each his own. You might like it, who knows. As for me I am never ordering it again.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Minute-Masala-500g
amazon_reviews.review: Nothing special.  Need to mix in a lot of the powder to get a decent tasting cup of tea.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Minute-Masala-500g
amazon_reviews.review: This instant tea is really good. The only thing you need to do is add 1 tsp of milk powder to 1 scoop of tea along with 100 ml hot water. Tastes great and is super refreshing! A must buy!

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Minute-Masala-500g
amazon_reviews.review: My favorite premixed Masala Tea... I only wish the policy of limited quantities of this product per customer is removed.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Minute-Masala-500g
amazon_reviews.review: Tried many premixed massala tea earlier.. didn't like them.. This time orded it with doubts.. but really amazed with the product..  It's really my choice of massala tea...

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Minute-Masala-500g
amazon_reviews.review: We are regularly using this tea..Best option for early morning busy routines..Just pour hot or warm water and your tea is ready..Purchased several times now..

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Minute-Masala-500g
amazon_reviews.review: Best instant teaoutstanding taste masala tea😋

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Daily-Elachi-Premix-Pouch
amazon_reviews.review: The flavour and aroma are amazing but simply mixing water gives a very thin consistency. I mix a spoon of milk powder to get the thickness of milk so that it feels like real tea. It's also cheaper, even for a wholesale pack, compared to other companies.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Premium-Packet-1000g
amazon_reviews.review: The original society tea the blue packet is better than this. It has one salty taste that make the tea horrible. No premium quality. Price has increased with deteriorated quality

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Premium-Packet-1000g
amazon_reviews.review: The tea is really good. Tastes better than wagh bakri premium tea but grain size is much smaller.Leaves a lot of dust at the bottom of the container which is a bit annoying. Every time you finish the container, a lot of tea will be wasted in the form of dust.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Premium-Packet-1000g
amazon_reviews.review: We are drinking this tea since years when we are in Mumbai.Only recently started to purchase it on amazon as it is'nt available in any stores across Hyderabad.But in few packets the tea is very tiny n does not taste as strong as it should be.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Premium-Packet-1000g
amazon_reviews.review: As the pricing was highest for this product in the company range assumed that it would be the best color and flavor.However was disspointed as the flavor is similar to the cheaper leaf tea or even some good dust variety. Also the tea leaves had some foul chemical odour coming, usually teas leaves give a fine frangance.This was prepared with full milk and not black. Not buying this again for sure.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Premium-Packet-1000g
amazon_reviews.review: Great taste. Bought it for my parents as they prefer mild teas and it is great for both mild and strong teas. We add a bit more leaves to make it strong. Most teas in Kerala have a flowery taste and they are not good for masala chai. This purchase solved that issue. It's great as a black tea as well. Just don't boil it while making black tea. Boil the leaves only for masala chai.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Premium-Packet-1000g
amazon_reviews.review: Good strong flavour, low price. But falsely advertised as "premium Leaf". It is very granular, almost like coffee grounds.Grains smaller than standard CTC, something like Dust Tea.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Premium-Packet-1000g
amazon_reviews.review: Very good taste. Feel the rich aroma. Very refreshing. After tasting several brands, found this tea with the premium flavor I was looking for. I will buy only this Society Premium tea moving forward.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Premium-Packet-1000g
amazon_reviews.review: The flavous is awesome and packs a punch. It's on the stronger side of the spectrum so those who prefer a lighter flavour should look for something else. The delivery was fast and reacher here a good condition.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Premium-Packet-1000g
amazon_reviews.review: Excellent tea very very strong tea previous i used taj mahal tea that's a very very worst product love you society Premium tea

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Premium-Packet-1000g
amazon_reviews.review: Strong tea. I prefer it this way.

amazon_reviews.review: I'm a new mom and trust me every second is important to me. Society one minute tea saves a lot of my time. I don't have to wait for tea to boil or anything. Just a cup of hot water and a tea bag is all I need.

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Minute-Ginger-Lemongrass
amazon_reviews.review: Excellent dilute out of premix tried till time. Good test perfect no difference found compare to daily tea prepared with tea milk sugar and masala

amazon_reviews.name: Society-Tea-Minute-Ginger-Lemongrass
amazon_reviews.review: This one-minute tea is perfect for all hardcore tea lovers. It may not be as good as a thorough-boiled tea in your house but it is way, way better than those futile tea bags that add no taste to the hot water. Perfect for office use or while you travel, it shall surely make you feel home, wherever you are. :)

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-500g
amazon_reviews.review: It is strong and tastes very good. After trying almost 10 different brands of tea, I have found the one I like. I have tried Taj Mahal, Red label, RCM and many different others.I like my tea strong and for that you don't have to add too much of this tea. It is not just too strong tea, it tastes good. Most in my family like it and this is the one we are going to use from now on along with Red Label for those who like Red Label more.And Amazon, from time to time, provides good discounts on products and makes them affordable for all. Btw, it sells for 355 next door mall when Amazon is selling it for 385. I know shipping costs, so it is ok.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-500g
amazon_reviews.review: We in our family have switched from Red Label to Tata Tea Gold now.Red Label is not bad, its just this one is better.This tea is perfect blend of aroma, taste and strong nature of tea. This is perfectly balanced tea between taste and kadak chai.Wagh bakri Tea is too strong with awful taste and Red Label is not so strong but taste good.This one got balanced both of it. So a must buy.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-500g
amazon_reviews.review: Received d product safe n intact But first time I received the very OLD dated products tea powder 7.5 month older and Ketchup is also 7.5 month older...:(Ketchup is to be used within 1.5 month... that to 1kg I have ordered.. :(sir, before this order I purchased Tata Tea Powder two months ago that product was received with Mfg. date 03/2017...!!! but now I received 2016 Mfg productsLoosing faith on Grocery Order...:(

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-500g
amazon_reviews.review: The quality of the item is not up to the mark. The flavor and the strong test that we (me & my family) found in local shops of ₹10 pack of this tea is missing here.This item is fully useless in case of making liquor tea(red tea). If less liquor is given the tea seems nothing but boiled water & if given more the tea becomes black. I got stuck with this 500gm tea.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-500g
amazon_reviews.review: I have been using this product for more than three years but I always purchased 500 gm and 250 gm pack but this is the first time that I have purchased 1 kg pack with the expectation that the quality would be same but alas! this 1 kg pack has too much dust tea and very less leaf tea compared to 500 gm or 250 gm pack.Regarding price it is competitive than market price and regarding delivery I would give amazon one star.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-500g
amazon_reviews.review: Got it on deal arnd @190 rs.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-500g
amazon_reviews.review: Reviewing CTC tea can be tricky: everyone has their own preferences. Flavour profiles that one has become accustomed to often determines how one reacts to a new tea.For the purpose of making milk tea,  this particular brand is quite good: a strong combination of good colour, definitely pleasing fragrance and taste that's firm but not too overpowering.This is a good option for someone used to tee leaves made by the likes of Wagh Bakri. This has slightly more liquor to it than the Wagh Bakhri and the fragrance spectrum is a bit wider.If you're the type who likes your Tata Agni and similar robust and bolder tea leaves then this may not be what you're looking for.It's price point is on the higher side and may be a factor for many. That said,  if you enjoy that one good cup a day,  it's a worthy buy-in.My recommendation: certainly worth a try especially if you like a good,  developed flavour in your cuppa.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-500g
amazon_reviews.review: Its hard to believe how much they have gone down on the quality aspect compared to what it was 5 years back.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-500g
amazon_reviews.review: see the product is genuine with latest mfgIt was well packed toothe only griviance is that even after being a prime member I receive the product after a week hope amazon consider that for next time

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-500g
amazon_reviews.review: This tata tea gold is a real gem in the house from tata. In my house we are using this tea since many long long years. And everyone like it. So fellows go for it blindly give it a try and i am really sure with this decision you wont regret it.Ps :  if you guys like very strong tea then go for tata premium this one is little mild, use elaichi, ginger and honey mix it well it adds up the flavour to your tea. I hope this review help you to choose right tea for yourself.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-500g
amazon_reviews.review: Quality as expected. Most of the people already have used this product. A very good taste. Using for years and no complaints from this product. Also got 15-20% discount on the price. So satisfied.If you liked my review please hit 'helpful' to motivate me to write loyal reviews.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-500g
amazon_reviews.review: Bought it  for Rs.182 instead of rs.216. all of you know the quality of tata tea very well. If you don't then try this product and you qon

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-500g
amazon_reviews.review: I was using Red label since ages and some time back switched to Tata Gold tea for some reason.I must say Tata gold is way cheaper and tests much batter than Red Label.Also quantity required to make a cup of tea is lesser compared to Red Label.These are my reasons to switch to Tata Gold:  1. Because of the controversial advertising by Red Label where they said that people go to Kumbh Mela to abandon  their old age parents. Thse MNCs come to India, make money from us and than mock us, this should not be tolerated.  2. To support Indian Brands like Tata, Patanjali, Dabur, etc.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-500g
amazon_reviews.review: One of the best tea from the house of Tata and it is is a beautiful tea having good taste and flavour... actually it is an appropriate mixture of CTC and leaf tea..I ordered this product from Amazon and it was delivered on the next day in a very good packaging... I got it at discounted price...I got the product at 15% discounted price, as I bought the product during Super Value Days.The manufacturing date of product was just 2 and half months ago from date when I received the product in hand. Hence it is recently manufactured product. Also the product have a very good shelf life.Amazon delivered the product in very good condition and packaging of the product was just awesome. No damage. Amazing...The Amazon pantry box are very hard and during packaging they insert air filled sealed packets, so that the items don't move and pressure is absorbed by the air filled packets.Delivery of my order was just the next day morning. The delivery man took the package inside of my house, as it was heavy and kept the pantry box over a table, as I told him. I behavior of the delivery man was good.I am highly satisfied with the product and I recommend you to buy the product without any fear and hesitation. Believe me you will be satisfied after receiving the product and using it.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-500g
amazon_reviews.review: This tea surprisingly has no taste and flavour, aroma at all. Total waste of money. With 2 spoons for a cup of tea there is no taste at all it feels like we are having just hot water with sugar. It needs 3 spoons for a cup, to atleast get slight taste of tea. I took 500gm pack now it's getting difficult to even finish the pack and start with some new tea. I took this tea because my regular brand Wagh Bakri was not available. Such tasteless tea is really not expected from brand Tata.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-500g
amazon_reviews.review: Looks Like Duplicate, When buy from Near by Grocery Shop, the taste is different.Delivered in Amazon pantry packets taste is very inferior, no aroma and color.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-500g
amazon_reviews.review: Nothing like Gold. It tastes really unexpected, not worth the price. Don't know what is the hype about.I purchased this Tea pack with GREAT EXPECTATIONS but was disappointed because even when I added two full spoons of tea leaves didn't really got that aroma and taste and not even color.Assuming by the reviews I am reading, It could be a fake product that I received.Will surely try to purchase again and give my valuable feedback.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-500g
amazon_reviews.review: I think it's one of the best available tea in this segment in the market... After all its a TATA product... It has long leaves...Please note that you have to use more quantity as compared to regular tea... I recommend making tea in a closed container on slow/low flame for best results...

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-500g
amazon_reviews.review: This tata tea gold is a real gem in the house from tata. In my house we are using this tea since many long long years. And everyone like it. So fellows go for it blindly give it a try and i am really sure with this decision you wont regret it.Ps :  if you guys like very strong tea then go for tata premium this one is little mild, use elaichi, ginger and honey mix it well it adds up the flavour to your tea. I hope this review help you to choose right tea for yourself.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-500g
amazon_reviews.review: Quality as expected. Most of the people already have used this product. A very good taste. Using for years and no complaints from this product. Also got 15-20% discount on the price. So satisfied.If you liked my review please hit 'helpful' to motivate me to write loyal reviews.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-500g
amazon_reviews.review: Bought it  for Rs.182 instead of rs.216. all of you know the quality of tata tea very well. If you don't then try this product and you qon

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-500g
amazon_reviews.review: I was using Red label since ages and some time back switched to Tata Gold tea for some reason.I must say Tata gold is way cheaper and tests much batter than Red Label.Also quantity required to make a cup of tea is lesser compared to Red Label.These are my reasons to switch to Tata Gold:  1. Because of the controversial advertising by Red Label where they said that people go to Kumbh Mela to abandon  their old age parents. Thse MNCs come to India, make money from us and than mock us, this should not be tolerated.  2. To support Indian Brands like Tata, Patanjali, Dabur, etc.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-500g
amazon_reviews.review: One of the best tea from the house of Tata and it is is a beautiful tea having good taste and flavour... actually it is an appropriate mixture of CTC and leaf tea..I ordered this product from Amazon and it was delivered on the next day in a very good packaging... I got it at discounted price...I got the product at 15% discounted price, as I bought the product during Super Value Days.The manufacturing date of product was just 2 and half months ago from date when I received the product in hand. Hence it is recently manufactured product. Also the product have a very good shelf life.Amazon delivered the product in very good condition and packaging of the product was just awesome. No damage. Amazing...The Amazon pantry box are very hard and during packaging they insert air filled sealed packets, so that the items don't move and pressure is absorbed by the air filled packets.Delivery of my order was just the next day morning. The delivery man took the package inside of my house, as it was heavy and kept the pantry box over a table, as I told him. I behavior of the delivery man was good.I am highly satisfied with the product and I recommend you to buy the product without any fear and hesitation. Believe me you will be satisfied after receiving the product and using it.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-500g
amazon_reviews.review: This tea surprisingly has no taste and flavour, aroma at all. Total waste of money. With 2 spoons for a cup of tea there is no taste at all it feels like we are having just hot water with sugar. It needs 3 spoons for a cup, to atleast get slight taste of tea. I took 500gm pack now it's getting difficult to even finish the pack and start with some new tea. I took this tea because my regular brand Wagh Bakri was not available. Such tasteless tea is really not expected from brand Tata.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: If you really a teas fan, you definitely not being unaware of the TATA Tea family. Trusted brand from so many years. I tried almost every standard brand of Teas available in the market, but at last I can say that TATA Tea is the best available brand in the printed price. Although TATA Tea brand is already quite efficient in serving the purpose but the current addition of 'TATA Tea Gold' actually makes sense because of the quality enhancement by adding dried whole tea leaves in to the processed tea. Mixing of whole leaf resulted into the enhanced flavor & color of the prepared Tea. Not more concentrated not milder, it’s like a balanced golden color with real taste/flavor which designed exactly keeping in mind the expectation of the user.1. I agree that if you require strong color/flavor you need to add a little more leaves in to the preparation because TATA Tea Gold is not meant for people who like very strong color seekers. Its more workable for people who wants real flavor with natural golden color in the final preparation. Although even a single tea-spoon is enough to prepare a natural golden cup full of real tea.2. One may keep in mind before using that this tea contains real whole dry tea leaves, so it may take more 2 minutes in preparation in comparison with other brands and the reason is, it is without any added artificial colors into it. The whole dried tea leaves takes time to release real flavor of the contents.3. Taste is premium & up to the expectations as always.4. Packaging is good enough. Visual ergonomic principles well taken into consideration designing the same. Its smarter and visually appealing than the previous packs.I’m using this product from more than 2 years. So, its not an random review. In my family we are using this product in making of every single cup day and night 24x7, whenver we feel like to have one.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: I prefer Tata tea to Brooke Bond/Taj Mahal.# Mild taste and fresh aroma# Gives me a soothing effect and relishes# Only small quantity sufficient for making tea# Does not play around with the basic tea taste# Can be consumed with milk or without itThe only issue is with the packaging, I would have preferred plastic box packaging for the price.That would actually help in preserving the aroma and prevent moisture.But, it's one of the best tea for everyday use.Cheers :)

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: Flavour of this tea is goodIt includes little leafs you can see them in itMust try tea

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: For those who love tea this is a great blend.1. It is a mix of  assam tea and leaf tea - gets you the best of both.2. To enjoy the blend and the tea it should be put in boiling water ( do not boil it post putting tea)3. Let it simmer for some time  3-5 min , and add sugar and milk separately .4. It works out great for the tea lovers and offers a consistent blend all the time.Once you start liking this tea - you will get hooked to it....

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: I love Tea...  Tata gold tea is one of the best product of Tata...  This it is very useful for daily use...I got this product from Amazon and got a recently manufactured product... The product is a genuine product...There are other variety of Tea available in the market but among those Tata gold tea is is the best tea according to me for daily use...I got the product at 15% discounted price, as I bought the product during Super Value Days.The manufacturing date of product was just 2 and half months ago from date when I received the product in hand. Hence it is recently manufactured product. Also the product have a very good shelf life.Amazon delivered the product in very good condition and packaging of the product was just awesome. No damage. Amazing...The Amazon pantry box are very hard and during packaging they insert air filled sealed packets, so that the items don't move and pressure is absorbed by the air filled packets.Delivery of my order was just the next day morning. The delivery man took the package inside of my house, as it was heavy and kept the pantry box over a table, as I told him. I behavior of the delivery man was good.I am highly satisfied with the product and I recommend you to buy the product without any fear and hesitation. Believe me you will be satisfied after receiving the product and using it.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: After using Taj Mahal tea for 20 years, now since the quality of Taj Mahal tea has gone down tremendously, and we have gas and stomach problems after consuming taj mahal tea, we wanted to shift for a better tea. After finding out a lot about different brands, I can assure you This is best tea in India. Always buy this.The taste is awesome, the only drawback is you have to put a lot of tea if you're used to drinking strong tea. Otherwise this is awesome.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: Once you see the packing and presentation of the package, one gets positive vibes and expects a lot more than regular tea. ALAS! It is much the same as Agni. Nothing more. Have to use good quantity to prepare good tea.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: I am using Tata tea Premium regulary, but bought Tata tea gold just to give it a try to see if it's more strong in flavour/aroma or tastes something different. However could not feel much difference rather it is more or less same like Premium tea infact Premium is better..

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Tea-Gold-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: I have been taking Tata Gold tea since over two decades now. I have tried many cheap and expensive products but Tata Gold is non-replaceable. The new golden color packing is attractive.

amazon_reviews.review: The tea packet was torn . I would like this order replaced

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Agni-Leaf-Tea-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: I always purchase Tata Agni Leaf tea. Could observe the quality and taste difference a lot this time. Quality not up to the mark. There is much difference between the previous and current tata agni tea purchase. Going forward not going to buy this tea. Waste of money. Not sure if other buyers observed the same.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Agni-Leaf-Tea-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: Tata Tea Agni is good but the quality of this tea have changed a lot previously there was some leaves but nowadays Tata Tea Agni contains only powder tea or dust tea, it gives good liquor but not so much flavour.If you want good liquor along with flavour then you must go for Tata Gold tea that is a good tea. I bought Tata Tea Agni from Amazon at a very low price compared to the MRP and the packaging of the product was really awesome and it was delivered to my home address Durgapur Rana Pratap Road West Bengal within 5 days of ordering.If you want to buy good quality tea with good flavour then you should buy Tata Gold tea, Taj Mahal tea or Darjeeling tea.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Agni-Leaf-Tea-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: Simply put, the tea is flavourful & of good quality for a very cheap price compared to others in the market & also I got the 1kg pack for rs.170 which was manufactured recently. I got 3 packs & all 3 was delivered in great condition.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Agni-Leaf-Tea-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: Good package, it tastes good but  quantity less when compared to red label, but the aroma is nice.... Over all satisfied with the taste....

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Agni-Leaf-Tea-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: Tata Agni Tea is value for money. It's MRP is 220/- . Overall good for buy. I recommend to buy this product. Go for cheaper tea.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Agni-Leaf-Tea-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: ₹ 200It's a truly good deal for you !Market price per 100 gram is around ₹ 25-30 , but here's ₹ 20 only.Flavor is extremely good and quite strong.It comes specially for milk-tea.If you ask about the packaging quality, I say Amazon very much disappointed me for the first time, they parceled it via a single poly bag, no cardboard box provided which is not expected from Amazon.Luckily I have received my package 100 % good conditions !

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Agni-Leaf-Tea-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: Expected better quality tea from a brand like Tata tea👎. Very low quality tea. Didn't like it's flavour and taste. Maybe the tea was very old, expired quality. It's disappointing. Tea quality was not upto Tata tea standard.

amazon_reviews.name: Tata-Agni-Leaf-Tea-1kg
amazon_reviews.review: Tata Tea Agni is good if you're looking for good less priced option of tea. This tea is not too strong you've to add some large qty to make tea strong. But looking at it's price it's best. The price is 200/kg which is the lowest in the market. I'm using this for last 5 months. Recommended👍👍

amazon_reviews.review: The product was delivered on time. It's definitely worth the price. Using this for the past 3 months and I have no complaints. Quality of the product is exceptional. It's a bit heavy and no negatives apart from that...

amazon_reviews.name: Fastrack-Casual-Analog-White-Watch-NK3121SM01
amazon_reviews.review: I am writing review after 15 days use.Big dial as expected with great quality. Color of dial not too dark specially numbers as shown in photo. Bracelet is also very good. But the packing and container of watch is worst that i have ever seen in online shopping. sometime it stops working when it falls.By pushing the pin it starts working again.overall it is a very good watch. waterproofing  is also working properly.I bought it after 2 month search on amazon and flipkart and it makes worth.

amazon_reviews.name: Fastrack-Casual-Analog-White-Watch-NK3121SM01
amazon_reviews.review: Watch seems original but the price paid is equal to showroom price and if u add courier charge is over and above the selling price in showroom. Better buy from showroom rather online since u will get ur product immediately and can able to check the condition there itself. Rest about product is good but the steel quality is Matt finish and not that great to hold. Dial is awesome and lil big in size to give rich look.

amazon_reviews.name: Fastrack-Casual-Analog-White-Watch-NK3121SM01
amazon_reviews.review: Excellent quality and looking cool when I wear this, the white dial is awesome and I like it more. Orange needles for time indication gives good look to watch.

amazon_reviews.name: Fastrack-Casual-Analog-White-Watch-NK3121SM01

amazon_reviews.review: It is perfect. Good condition although the plastic box was cracked. The watch is original, works fine.

amazon_reviews.review: Charging unit is not received to me in the package.?How could I charge the band?

amazon_reviews.name: Reflex-Activity-Tracker-Monitor-SWD90066PP01
amazon_reviews.review: The display is very big it was not expected.Also functionality wise we have very few options. Also the display is horizontal and perpendicular to the hand which is difficult to view. By the way a I didn't used it for more time time, I returned it on the same day when I received. So I have no comments on on other portions. But I noticed that the steps tracker updates lately. It is not a step by step update, it is updating in its own time intervals which was not expected in this conventional wristbands of today's market.

amazon_reviews.name: Reflex-Activity-Tracker-Monitor-SWD90066PP01
amazon_reviews.review: I got a genuine product with a good packaging and safely handled.I have been using this band since 1 month. I didn’t face any issue with it’s battery life and performance. It has functionalities like distance, heart rate, Calorie, steps tracker Which are accurate and in time too. It displays only call And Whatsapp’s texts notifications ( I have connected my band to iphone so I have no idea if it performs differently when connected to Android smartphones). The battery life is almost 5 days if fully charged once! Sensors inside the watch work finely. This band helps to find the phone if lost. It tracks the sleep time as well which will be displayed on a phone. Hope this was helpful For you.

amazon_reviews.name: Reflex-Activity-Tracker-Monitor-SWD90066PP01
amazon_reviews.review: I'm Using Almost 2 months Nearly its Working Good and Style is Simply Nuce

amazon_reviews.name: Reflex-Activity-Tracker-Monitor-SWD90066PP01
amazon_reviews.review: The product stopped after one day of usage. But since it was a gift and I had bought it early the replacement period ran out. So I am now stuck with a non working smart watch which cannot be fixed anywhere locally. Any insight on what to do now will be really appreciated.

amazon_reviews.name: Reflex-Activity-Tracker-Monitor-SWD90066PP02
amazon_reviews.review: I like this band giving almost accurate Heart rate will very Good battery life. Good AMOLED top with decent look ,Broad daylight reading may be improved & if audio can be integrated will give more exciting feel factor

amazon_reviews.name: Reflex-Activity-Tracker-Monitor-SWD90066PP02
amazon_reviews.review: Pros -Looks goodIndian brandConsThe software is poor.The band and app get updated everyday for bug fixes, but the update never completes.Sleep tracker doesn't work properly - no auto sensor, it depends on manual time feeding for sleep, plus sleep data changes of band firmware update causes sudden change in connection.Call notification does not work. It worked for a couple of calls, but then stopped on its own.Though the sedentary reminder was switched off, the band keeps vibrating every 15 minutes for reminding, even while walking or doing work. It stops only in night mode or when active workout is on.

amazon_reviews.name: Reflex-Activity-Tracker-Monitor-SWD90066PP02
amazon_reviews.review: The heart rate monitor shows as OFF on the tracker whereas visible in the phone.The same value should be visible in the tracker as well as shown in the picture

amazon_reviews.name: Reflex-Activity-Tracker-Monitor-SWD90066PP02
amazon_reviews.review: I have an order, step tracking was not working and in replacement I received an used watch which was not even packed.

amazon_reviews.name: Reflex-Activity-Tracker-Monitor-SWD90066PP02
amazon_reviews.review: Ordered 2 of these and Got 2 defective pieces.Frequent impairing from mobile, discrepancy in sleep / movement tracking and horrible interface.Just bought this product for my parents because they wanted a made in India product but guess what, this product is made in China too! Great work Fastrack (Titan)!Would have given it Zero Stars if I possibly could.

amazon_reviews.name: MYSORE-SANDAL-Mysore-Sandal-Talcum
amazon_reviews.review: I have to thank the amazon recommendation engine for suggesting the mysore sandal talc. I never knew mysore sandal brand had a talc! I had purchased mysore sandal soap few weeks back and perhaps due to this purchase amazon would have recommended this as well. Glad I clicked the suggestion and bought one of these! It's good bye to my existing Ponds Sandalwood talc !This review compares Mysore sandal talc vis-a-vis Ponds Sandalwood talcPros-1. The Fragrance is the first thing which hits you as soon as you open the bottle. Its smells pure authentic sandal wood than the perfumed ponds talc powder2. The mysore sandal talc allows you to decide the size of the hole you want to have on the bottle. Ponds one forces you to have 3 holes as soon as you want the top cover. I always hated this with the ponds talc. Ponds really wants you to use more than what you need!3. The fragrance last longer than the ponds sandalwood talc even though out the day! Believe it or not - you have to try one and be the judge!4. Some reviews talk about the powder not been finely powdered. Nothing like that - the powder is as fine as it's with Ponds sandalwood talc. No more no less!5. The bottle is sealed with a hologram sticker - that's assurance of genuine product from mysore sandal!6. Somehow I like the press-fit top of the bottle to keep the fragrance intact in the bottle when not in use! Ponds bottle was a twist to close top which is not really a seal tight way of shutting close the bottle7. Last but not the least- mysore sandal talc is 50% cheaper than Ponds sandalwood - why on earth would I ever buy Ponds again?Cons-None that i spotted yet

amazon_reviews.name: MYSORE-SANDAL-Mysore-Sandal-Talcum
amazon_reviews.review: Mysore Sandal is best talc ever in market.. Long-lasting fragrance increase body charm. And I can its Pure natural sandalwood talc. also its very economic talc but no compromise in quality. Go on.....

amazon_reviews.name: MYSORE-SANDAL-Mysore-Sandal-Talcum
amazon_reviews.review: First time buy, the Talc is okay as its from Mysore Sandal, but still not sure about the scent, longevity and essence of it.Also minimum buy of 2, is not fair & also there wasn't any discount even at the sale time :-( ;-)Well, Amazon, Cloudtail India & Mysore Sandal have done good job, and I believe it will be genuine product!

amazon_reviews.name: MYSORE-SANDAL-Mysore-Sandal-Talcum
amazon_reviews.review: Just amazing fragrance....original product Delicately perfumed with pure natural sandalwood oil....thanks Amazon for giving me natural product ...Mysore sandal talc is the best talc forever..

amazon_reviews.name: MYSORE-SANDAL-Mysore-Sandal-Talcum
amazon_reviews.review: Texture is not good, should be finer. Not so cheap either, you can get Nivea 400 gms at same price.Quality also not good, not soft on my skin. Fragrance also not good, guess not a fan of sandalwood after all.

amazon_reviews.name: MYSORE-SANDAL-Mysore-Sandal-Talcum
amazon_reviews.review: be careful. the image is misleading. it looks like it is offering 3 diff sizes of talcum powder whereas the seller gives only one (large size). if you are expecting to receive all the 3 diff sizes of talcum powder then you are in for a big shock. I think the seller must take note and provide correct product image.

amazon_reviews.name: MYSORE-SANDAL-Mysore-Sandal-Talcum
amazon_reviews.review: I had ordered 2 of these which arrived on Dec 28 2019. However on opening the seals I noticed an unusual detergent like smell and had no smell like sandalwood oil.  It seems either a fraudulent product has been inserted into the container at the source or maybe this was done by some unethical third party. Wanted to return the items, but being a toiletry product, there is no such option. Very unhappy with the purchase

amazon_reviews.name: MYSORE-SANDAL-Mysore-Sandal-Talcum
amazon_reviews.review: It has terrific scent. It's not a pinkish or yellowish colour it's white colour but we can feel it long n last.I think package Design is changed but I'm sure about it, it's genuine product.Highly recommended go with this if ur choice is sandal.Because it's good brand with half of price than other ponds n santoor.

amazon_reviews.name: MYSORE-SANDAL-Mysore-Sandal-Talcum
amazon_reviews.review: Nice product, being a govt made product, the quality and genuineness are there.  No stains left in skin after use, whereas Ponds and some other sandal wood powders leave stucky white stain marks. Fragrance is also long lasting.

amazon_reviews.name: MYSORE-SANDAL-Mysore-Sandal-Talcum
amazon_reviews.review: The best product .. So pure.. Must buy

amazon_reviews.name: Mysore-Whitening-Rejuvenating-Face-Pack
amazon_reviews.review: I bought this on a lark and it had been sitting on a shelf for a very long time. Till I developed warts on my chin. No amount of pulling and scrubbing helped and I was reluctant to use over-the-counter wart paint because of all the pharma warnings on them.I decided to use this clay on the warts, covering them with a generous coat of the clay twice a day and kept it on day and night for a month. Voila!I had to be patient but a month of application fixed my skin. Whatever this face pack contains, it is extremely effective. I used to a feel a constant sting after application but it can be ignored. The best part is that it didn't affect healthy skin adversely unlike wart paints which require precautions.Caution - These warts weren't because of an STD. I probably picked them up at the gym or some other place with too many people milling around in sweat. Please seek your doctor's advice if you have an STD. This face pack should not be applied on your eyelids or where you have a chance of ingesting it. Read disclaimers on the package.

amazon_reviews.name: Mysore-Sandal-Millennium-Soap-150g
amazon_reviews.review: It’s the worst thing you can buy. Do not waste your money. You will land up to a soap which will lead to dry skin after bath and you won’t feel like using it again.  Only using name like millennium soap doesn’t make it a soap of millennium. Buy products like nutregena or forest essential rather then buying this particular soap.

amazon_reviews.name: Mysore-Sandal-Millennium-Soap-150g
amazon_reviews.review: i always buy this soap cause it smells like strong sandal wood. when i was first introduced to the soap it was a guy coming out of the shower and i stopped him asking which parfum he uses and he pointed me to the soap. at first i couldnt believe it but now after so many years using it there is no doubt anymore.

Disappointed.. i miss the pure, older millennium soap
